be deeply/warmly liked / well received by… (positive PR collocation)
must; be sure to (strong imperative, more emphatic than 一定 in written instructions)
so that; in order to facilitate (formal purpose conjunction in written business Chinese)

takeaways: 中文商务信函以'尊敬的+职衔'而非'亲爱的'开头，结尾固定套语为'祝…顺利！'或'祝…愉快！'，落款依次为：自称+日期。
称呼对方公司时用'贵公司'，自己公司用'我司'或公司全称；这是商务中文敬语体系的基础，不可混淆。
广告体文字大量省略主语，动词短语直接连排，如'诚聘…两名。要求：…'——这是广告精炼语言的标志，不代表语法错误。
把字句的核心条件：受事宾语须确定；动词须带补语/宾语/助词等（不能裸动词）；有/是/知道/认识不能入把字句。
意义被动句（无被/让/叫）更常见于口语，如'报告时间改了''票订好了'；书面被动才用被字句；两者并非可以随意互换。
以及只连接名词/名词短语（不连接从句），并连接动词性成分，两者均属书面正式语，可区别于口语的和/还有。
只有…才…强调唯一充分条件，语气强于如果…就…；商务汉语中常用于强调竞争优势的获取路径（只有…才能占据优势）。
尤其是用于列举最强案例，位于已列举事物之后，与英语especially引导的追加最高项用法相同，后接具体时间/事例。
举行以活动为主语（强调发生），举办以主办方为主语（强调组织），二者不可混用；举办培训班/研讨会/讲座是固定搭配。
从事接领域或职业，仅用于长期专业性活动，不用于单次临时行为；是简历和人物介绍中的核心动词，后常跟'研究'或'工作'。
商务晚宴话题有隐性顺序：从个人背景（国籍/居住地）→城市/地区话题→行业竞争→双方业务，循序渐进避免过早涉及商业核心。
不比+adj否定的是预设（对方认为A不如B），而没有+adj是直接断言（A确实不如B）；语用差异不可忽视，混淆会误导听者。
正式通知文体的完整结构依次为：活动名称+时间+地点→课程/议程→师资简介→费用（含明细）→联系方式→回执表；各项缺一不可。
相当是精确的程度副词，程度介于很和非常之间，且含'出乎预期地正面'的语气，与quite/rather接近，书面口语均可用。
电话对话遵循固定脚本：问候→报单位/姓名→找人→确认身份（'我就是'）→说明来意→确认细节（含复述）→告别；复述是礼貌确认的核心环节。

Define your terms before arguing. Open with 我想先说明三个具体的概念 and enumerate each with 第一个概念是…，它包括… This immediately signals rigor and makes any subsequent data easier to interpret. Applicable to presentations, reports, and analytical memos.
Use the 第一个数字是…第二个数字是… scaffolding to present multiple data points with clear logical separation. Always close with 这些数据说明，… to state the conclusion explicitly — never leave the reader to infer it.

In company profiles and business descriptions, follow the fixed Chinese sequence: equity/ownership structure → founding date and location → departmental structure → headcount → operational milestones with numbers. Deviating from this order reads as amateurish.

The chained 边…边… in triplets (边建设边生产，边生产边经营，边经营边开发) creates a rhetorical rhythm implying simultaneously integrated, self-reinforcing development. Use it for describing corporate growth phases; it sounds more dynamic than listing phases sequentially.

Use 自从…后，从X到Y to frame before/after narratives with quantified results. This structure is the standard in Chinese business case writing for attributing improvement to a specific decision or investment.

In written trade inquiries, always specify all four elements: price term (Incoterm: 工厂交货价, 船上交货价, etc.), packaging (包装), available quantity (可提供数量), and earliest delivery date (最早交货期). Missing any of these signals inexperience to Chinese trade counterparts.

贵方 (your party) is the correct formal term in negotiations and contracts; 贵公司 is for general business correspondence. Deploying 贵方 in a negotiation context signals professional command of formal trade register.

Formal Chinese broadcasts and press releases follow a strict formula: audience address (听众朋友们，大家好) → date + program name → 根据 + source → findings with rankings → concluding synthesis. Master this template to write press releases and economic briefings.
The standard ranking formula is 以[metric]排名第[N]位, not simply 第N名. The 以…排名 construction specifies the basis for ranking, which is more precise and more common in formal economic reporting.

该公司 is the correct anaphoric reference for 'the company' in formal business writing (not 这家公司 or 它). Switching from the company's full name to 该公司 in the second sentence immediately elevates the register of any business report paragraph.
To describe org chart hierarchy, alternate 在X手下有Y and Y手下有Z without repeating the same sentence pattern — it creates a clean top-down cascade that is readable and not repetitive.

The conditional commitment formula 那就要看贵方的价格了。如果价格很优惠，我可以马上订货 lets a buyer signal genuine interest while preserving leverage. It is more face-preserving and commercially savvy than a flat refusal or an unconditional yes.

Use 首次超过 (surpassed for the first time) to mark milestones; it is more emphatic and formal than 第一次超过. Paired with 继续保持稳定增长 for prior trend data, it creates a narrative arc: sustained growth → breakthrough milestone.

The 除了…以外，…也必须… construction is the correct way to expand a list inclusively (everyone on the list, plus these additional people). Distinguish it from 除了…以外，其他都… which is exclusive (everyone except those listed).

takeaways: This chunk is exclusively the tail end of the book's glossary (pp. 150–151, entries Y–Z), containing no connected prose, essays, or grammar explanations. All extractable value is in the vocabulary list itself.

High-priority business register cluster: 营业额, 预付金, 子公司, 资产, 折旧, 租赁, 拥有权, 战略, 针对, 优先, 依据 — these recur constantly in financial reports, contracts, and strategy documents. Drill collocations, not just definitions.

Idiom cluster worth memorising as essay openers or transitions: 众所周知 (it is well known that…), 一蹴而就 (often negative: 不能一蹴而就 — cannot be achieved overnight), 忧心忡忡 (to convey stakeholder anxiety), 有识之士 (to confer authority on a viewpoint).

China-specific institutional vocabulary: 职称 (state-system professional-rank titles), 摇号 (lottery allocation of scarce permits), 一二线 (tier-1/2 city market framing) — essential for understanding Chinese business press and policy documents.

Productive suffix to internalize: 一族 (-zú) as a demographic label suffix. Examples from broader corpus: 上班族 (office workers), 月光族 (those who spend their whole salary), 啃老族 (adults dependent on parents). Use it to coin or decode social-group terms instantly.
Tech/digital layer: 云存储, 移动 (as adj. prefix: 移动端, 移动支付, 移动互联网), 指纹 — these appear in any contemporary business-Chinese reading and signal digital-economy fluency.

OCR note: The file shows OCR artifacts — Russian-language watermark text ('Больше книг о китайском языке на') and timestamps ('16:33:03') — but these do not corrupt the Chinese content, which is clean and fully recoverable.

essays.title: 从中国制造到中国创造
essays.text:
尽管中国的GDP和出口额都已经排在了世界前列，也有了十多家世界500强企业，但在全球100个著名品牌的排行榜中，没有一个上榜的品牌。

国际市场上90%的丝绸服装是中国生产的，但没有驰名商标，别人贴上了名牌商标，同样的产品就增加了180倍的价格，中国工厂只能赚取几十块的加工费。由于成本低廉，温州的一个打火机，只卖一两个欧元还有收益，因此在欧美等地出现了反倾销的案例。在经济全球化的时代，依靠低成本优势拓展市场的路已经走到尽头了。目前越来越多的中国企业已经意识到了自有品牌的重要性，他们加大投入开始产品的自主开发，申请产品专利，树立自己的品牌。

品牌可以帮助消费者识别、选择最合适的商品。对于消费者来说，品牌就是一种标准，是一种信任，也是一种时尚。尤其是电视等高值耐用品，如果消费者对于品牌缺乏认知，产品再好，也很难有人买单。

对于企业而言，品牌是一种信誉、一种价值和一种力量。所谓信誉，就是消费者对企业产品和服务的一种长期认可。所谓价值，就是企业资产。可口可乐品牌价值800亿美元，其公司总裁说，如果哪天可口可乐在一夜之间消失的话，那么他凭借这个品牌，不用一周就可以在全世界重建帝国。品牌也是一种竞争的力量，通过品牌可以赢得市场，赢得利润，赢得客户。大家都知道80%的运动鞋产在中国，几乎是同样的一种产品，如果贴上耐克(Nike)商标，它的价格可以增加五到十倍，这就是品牌的价值。

中国品牌的提升首先应该注重产品质量，其次要提高产品技术含量，然后要在拥有自主知识产权的基础上提升产品形象。三星集团(Samsung)为了提升产品形象，决心从沃尔玛（Wal-Mart）全面撤出，就是一个很好的例子，中国货也不能总在地摊上卖。中国产品要从“中国制造”到“中国创造”，最终走向优质高价的品牌。
essays.summary: Argues that China must transition from low-cost OEM manufacturing to building globally recognized self-owned brands. Uses data (silk, lighters, Nike shoes, Coca-Cola) to illustrate the massive value gap. Prescribes three sequential steps: product quality, technology content, and IP-backed brand image.
essays.why_study: Excellent model for HSK-6-level argumentative business essays: vivid statistics anchor abstract arguments; the 所谓…就是… definition device appears twice in one paragraph; the 首先…其次…然后… prescription structure is immediately reusable; the 从……走向…… frame provides a powerful closing arc. Vocabulary density is high and entirely professional register.
key_devices: Concessive opening: 尽管……但…… to establish tension between GDP size and brand absence
所谓X，就是… — twice — to define brand concepts analytically
Tricolon anaphora: 品牌是一种信誉、一种价值和一种力量
Parallel verb-object tricolon: 赢得市场，赢得利润，赢得客户
Concrete vivid numbers: 180倍, 800亿美元, 五到十倍 — grounds abstract arguments
首先……其次……然后…… for prescriptive enumeration
从……走向…… as horizon-expanding conclusion frame
对于消费者来说…… / 对于企业而言…… — alternating perspectives structure

essays.title: 关于产品改进
essays.text:
由于不同国家或地区的经济发展水平、社会文化背景、政治法律等环境各不相同，所以，进行国际贸易一般要对原有产品进行改进。改进的内容包括：

1.产品功能的改进
由于不同地区经济发展水平和自然条件不同，厂商往往要针对消费者的需求在同一产品上增加或减少一部分功能和配套设备，如西欧一些国家，人们习惯用热水洗衣服，洗衣机里就要增加电热设备。

2.生产标准的改进
由于不同国家的电力系统不同，计量单位不同，进入国际市场的产品，尤其是机械电子产品，必须严格按照国际标准生产。ISO9000系列标准就是为了适应出口贸易和国际经济合作的需要，由国际标准化组织于1987年制定并公布的，世界上已有60多个国家和地区采用了这一标准。

3.外观的改进
由各国消费者的民族习惯、文化背景不同，形成了不同的审美观念，如中国人喜欢红色，认为蓝、黑、白色与死亡、悲痛有关，而泰国人视红、白、蓝色为国色。产品在进入国际市场之前，应在这些方面对原有产品的颜色、造型及其包装进行改进，以适应当地消费者的需求和爱好。

进入国际市场时，产品的品牌和商标是否需要改变，取决于多种因素。一般说来，如果企业实力雄厚，产品在国际上已有知名度，不仅不需要改变产品品牌和商标，而且应该作为一种知识产权在世界各国注册，以获得法律保护：如果企业实力不强，产品质量较高但缺乏知名度，则应考虑选择一家有名的生产同类产品的企业，或在国际上有知名度的中间商，用他们的品牌和商标打入国际市场，等打开销路后，再使用自己的品牌和商标。
essays.summary: A structured analytical text covering three types of product adaptation required for international trade (functional, standards, aesthetic), followed by strategic guidance on brand and trademark decisions based on the firm's existing strength and market recognition.
essays.why_study: Excellent model for analytical/instructional prose: numbered section headers, repeated 由于…，… causal framing, the conditional branching pattern (如果A…不仅…而且…；如果B…则应…), and the purposive 以 connector. Showcases formal 进行 + V construction throughout. Very reusable for business writing about market entry, product strategy, or trade compliance.
key_devices: Numbered section structure with thematic subheadings — analytic report format
Repeated 由于…，… causal chain to justify each adaptation requirement
具体例子 (西欧洗衣机, 中泰国色彩习俗) to ground abstract cultural points
双重条件 if-then branching: 如果企业实力雄厚…不仅…而且…；如果实力不强…则应…
以 as formal purpose connector: 以适应…, 以获得…
进行 + V for formal sustained actions: 进行改进, 进行审核
Temporal sequence: 等打开销路后，再使用…

essays.title: 某建筑分公司总经理述职报告
essays.text:
各位领导、各位同事：早上好！

现在，我把自己任职以来的工作情况向各位做一个简单的汇报。

首先我报告一下履行职责的情况。

从去年1月12日分公司实行高级管理职位竞选上岗以后，我担任建筑公司总经理一职，重点分管对外业务联系、施工工作协调、工程招投标、合同管理、日常事务管理。经过近一年的工作，我已经完全融入到了这个团队里。总结一年来的工作，主要有以下三个方面：

1.业务拓展情况
自今年年初以来，我们努力承接对外施工业务，先后参加了九龙园A区和B区工程项目的招标工作，目前正在准备投标文件，从我们了解的情况来看，我公司中标的希望很大。

2.现有施工项目管理情况
目前公司施工项目不多，主要是去年几个项目的收尾工作，在全体员工的共同努力下，施工进展良好。

3.建设企业文化
为了提高公司管理工程的水平，我们通过组织一系列的培训学习，使全体员工认识到：工作岗位没有高低之分，只要大家齐心努力，就可以发挥最大的团队力量。另外，我们在过去的一年中努力降低内部消耗，在水、电以及办公耗材等方面节省开支，避免浪费。在保证工程进度的前提下，仅水电一项就节省开支200万元。

下面我谈一谈存在的问题和今后努力的方向。

回顾检查存在的问题，我认为主要有两点：第一，公司在市场开发方面做得不够，下一步的工作重点是要加大宣传力度，扩大公司的影响。第二，高素质的技术设计人员不足，我们计划有步骤地招聘一些专业人才，不断提高工程方案设计质量。

作为总经理，在今后的工作中，我将努力学习，提高工作能力和业务水平，尽快把公司建设成建筑行业的一流企业。

以上是我的述职报告，请各位领导和在座的各位员工进行审议监督。

谢谢大家！
essays.summary: A construction branch company general manager's annual work report: opening with role and scope, presenting three numbered achievement areas (business expansion, project management, corporate culture), then acknowledging two problems and proposing remedies, closing with forward commitment and invitation for oversight.
essays.why_study: The canonical 述职报告 (accountability speech) structure. Every element is a formulaic slot reusable for any such report. The move from achievements to problems to future direction is the expected logical arc. Register is formal spoken-written hybrid. Mastering this genre is essential for mid-to-senior professional contexts.
key_devices: Formal address: 各位领导、各位同事：早上好！
Opening pivot: 现在，我把自己任职以来的工作情况向各位做一个简单的汇报
Role statement: 我担任…一职，重点分管…
Three-point numbered achievement section with thematic subheadings
Self-critical problem section: 回顾检查存在的问题，我认为主要有两点：
Forward commitment: 我将努力…，尽快把公司建设成…一流企业
Formal close inviting oversight: 以上是我的述职报告，请各位领导…进行审议监督。谢谢大家！

essays.title: 辞呈（李新红）
essays.text:
辞呈

尊敬的董事长：

您好！

首先，非常感谢您这三年来对我的信任和关照。

自三年前到公司任职以来，我觉得能有机会到公司来工作是我的幸运，所以我一直非常珍惜这份工作。在公司工作的这三年多的时间中，我学到了很多东西，无论是在专业技能方面还是做人方面都有了很大的进步，感谢公司给予我这样的工作和锻炼机会，感谢公司领导对我的关心和培养，也感谢同事们对我的无私帮助和支持。但同时我也发现自己对目前所从事的业务主管工作的兴趣正逐渐减少，我不希望自己带着这样的情绪工作，这样既对不起公司也对不起自己。我希望能够学习更多的专业技能，接受更大的挑战。因此我决定辞职。对于我此刻的离开我只能表示深深的歉意，请您谅解并支持我做出的决定。希望我们以后还有共事的机会。我会在两周后离开公司，以便完成工作交接。

在这三年中，公司在不断进步，我很遗憾不能再为公司辉煌的明天贡献自己的力量，衷心地祝愿公司业绩不断提升！祝公司领导和各位同事工作顺利！

顺祝
安好！

李新红
2009年9月5日
essays.summary: A model resignation letter from a business manager. Opens with gratitude, recaps growth and gratitude for colleagues, gives a personal-growth reason for leaving without blaming the company, apologizes for the inconvenience, specifies a two-week transition, and closes with blessings for the company.
essays.why_study: Defines the standard Chinese formal resignation letter (辞呈) structure: gratitude first, honest-but-diplomatic reason, expression of regret/apology, concrete transition timeline, final blessing. The register is formal but emotionally warm — the correct balance. The closing formula 顺祝安好！ and the honorific 尊敬的 are directly reusable.
key_devices: Formal title: 辞呈 as document header
Salutation: 尊敬的董事长：
Gratitude-first opening: 首先，非常感谢您…
Balanced self-attribution of reason: 既对不起公司也对不起自己 — prevents blame
Concrete transition notice: 我会在两周后离开公司，以便完成工作交接
Closing blessing for company: 衷心地祝愿公司业绩不断提升！
Closing formula: 顺祝安好！+ name + date

essays.title: 求职信
essays.text:
求职信

尊敬的出版社负责人/领导：

您好！

我是来自韩国/美国的×××。我在报纸上看到贵社的招聘启事后，有意应聘发行主管一职。

我2008年毕业于北京大学光华管理学院行政管理专业，大学本科学历。大学期间曾在一家中美合资的出版集团公司实习，担任过一年的图书发行部部长助理职务，对图书发行工作有比较深入的了解，在工作中我积极进取，认真负责，能团结同事，虽然我工作的时间不长，但得到了发行部部长和同事的一致肯定。通过这次实习经历使我对图书出版发行工作产生了浓厚的兴趣，也积累了一定的经验。

本人能熟练使用电脑办公软件，精通英语、韩国语和汉语三种语言，拥有BCT4级、TOEIC870分等语言水平证书，有很强的与人沟通能力。本人性格开朗，富有创意，人际关系良好。

总之，我认为自己是非常适合该岗位的人选，如果贵社能够给我一个面试的机会并录用我的话，我一定会努力工作，发挥自己所有的才能，为贵社做出自己的贡献。对此我有充分的信心。

随信附上本人的简历，望查收。期待您的回复！祝贵社事业蒸蒸日上！

敬祝
冬安！

×××敬上
2008年11月18日
essays.summary: A model job application letter: states the source of the job ad and target position, describes education and internship experience with specific role details, lists skills and personal qualities, closes with a confident self-assessment, mentions attached resume, and ends with a seasonal blessing and 敬上.
essays.why_study: Defines the complete 求职信 structure slot by slot. The move from experience to skills to confident closing to attachments is the standard Chinese cover letter arc. The respectful 贵社 (your esteemed publisher), the closing formulas 事业蒸蒸日上 and 敬上/×××敬上 are directly imitable. Seasonal closings (冬安！= winter peace) are a classical Chinese letter convention.
key_devices: Honorific reference to employer: 贵社 (for publishers/organizations) vs 贵公司
Application trigger statement: 在报纸上看到贵社的招聘启事后，有意应聘…一职
Experience paragraph: specific role + duration + skill gained + external validation
Skills paragraph: software + languages + interpersonal + personality traits
Confident close: 我认为自己是非常适合该岗位的人选
Attachments notice: 随信附上本人的简历，望查收
Closing formula: 祝贵社事业蒸蒸日上！敬祝冬安！×××敬上 + date

essays.title: 合作共赢——麦当劳与连锁经营
essays.text:
作为全球最成功的快餐连锁企业之一，麦当劳的成功之道就是连锁经营。目前，麦当劳在华已经拥有近700家餐厅。麦当劳的成功也带动了中式快餐业的发展。成立于1995年的马兰拉面现有连锁店436家，其中包括境外的3家加盟店，年销售收入突破了4亿元。

加盟连锁店最大的好处是能直接借用总部的金字招牌和经验，降低经营的风险。对于没有经营经验的人，可以通过连锁总部的训练指导，比较容易在较短的时间内入行，成功的概率也比较大，这是加盟连锁店的优势。但是，分店会因为地方习俗、市场、竞争环境等的不同，与总部存在很大差异。加盟者“复制”完总部经营场所的环境、气氛和产品后，还要具有经营管理和开拓市场的能力。因为管理经验、资金不足或者加盟店太多等原因导致经营失败的加盟店也有很多。张女士的装饰品店就是一个例子。杭州的张女士参观了北京的总店后，很快就和总店签订了加盟协议。开业最初的两三个月，效益还不错。可是不到半年时间里，杭州又出现了三个加盟店，店里的商品品种、价位几乎和张女士店里的一模一样。到年底一算账，挣的钱支付完员工的工资、房租以后，利润还不到一千元。张女士只好关门转让了店铺。
essays.summary: Analyzes the franchise chain model using McDonald's and Malan Noodles as examples of success, then pivots to the risks and failure modes using the concrete case of Ms. Zhang's decorative shop in Hangzhou, which was squeezed out by competing franchisees within the same year.
essays.why_study: Excellent model for a balanced business analysis essay: opens with a well-known success case to establish the concept, states benefits with specific reasoning, then pivots fairly to risks, and clinches the downside argument with a specific narrative case study (张女士). This pros-then-cons-plus-case structure is widely reusable.
key_devices: Opening with a well-known anchor case (McDonald's) before introducing the less-known Chinese example
Concrete numbers: 436家连锁店, 年销售收入突破4亿元 — establish credibility quickly
Explicit benefit summary: 最大的好处是…
Transition pivot: 但是，……, 加盟者……还要……
Failure case narrative (张女士): specific timeline, city, and financial outcome
Understated closing: 张女士只好关门转让了店铺 — no editorializing, letting the story speak
金字招牌 as idiom for brand reputation

essays.title: 开业大吉——工商局门口的对话
essays.text:
（在工商管理局门口）

张大明（男）：这不是李经理吗？好久不见了，最近忙什么呢?
李林林（女）：是张主任啊！好久不见！我前不久离开了原来的公司，现在正在筹备自己开家公司呢，这不，今天就是来办理注册手续的。
张大明：自己当老板啦！恭喜恭喜，以后该叫你李老板啦。
李林林：哪里哪里！只是一点儿小买卖，以后肯定少不了和工商局打交道，有很多事还要向张主任请教。
张大明：不敢当。你们公司主要做什么业务啊？
李林林：还是做进出口贸易，主要经营服装，我以前在公司就是负责这一块业务，比较熟。张主任，这是我的新名片，您多指教。
张大明：（接过名片，边看边读）友联合资股份有限责任公司，董事长，喔，这哪儿是小买卖，挺大的嘛！
李林林：您知道我早就想开公司自己干，可是资金不足，正好有一家法国公司愿意投资入股，公司这才能开起来。现在还只有二三十名员工。
张大明：慢慢来嘛。我在这儿先祝贵公司生意兴隆！
李林林：谢谢！等我拿到营业执照开业那天，请张主任一定要到我们公司去看看。
张大明：好，到时候一定去。这会儿我要出去办点儿事，改天咱们再联系吧。
李林林：那您有事先忙，以后再专门去拜访您！再见！
essays.summary: A natural encounter dialogue between a former business associate (government official) and a new entrepreneur registering her company. Covers the social ritual of chance encounter, business card exchange, explaining a new venture, and appropriate blessing formulas.
essays.why_study: Models natural spoken register for professional social encounters: how to deflect praise modestly (哪里哪里！只是一点儿小买卖), how to frame requests for future guidance (以后肯定少不了和…打交道，有很多事还要向…请教), and key blessing/closing phrases (生意兴隆！). Also introduces core business-setup vocabulary: 筹备, 注册手续, 营业执照, 投资入股, 合资.
key_devices: Modest deflection: 哪里哪里！只是一点儿小买卖
Future guidance request: 以后肯定少不了和…打交道，有很多事还要向…请教
Card exchange: 这是我的新名片，您多指教
Blessing formula: 祝贵公司生意兴隆！
Polite exit: 您有事先忙，以后再专门去拜访您！
这不，今天就是来… — colloquial 'and here I am today to…'

essays.title: 芝麻开门——贷款电话
essays.text:
（电话铃响）

男：您好，这里是中原公司。
女：是李经理吗？我是大连投资有限公司的张红。
男：您好！张小姐，我就是李明。
女：贵公司的贷款申请书和提交的相关资料我们都收到了，我公司对这些资料进行了仔细审核和实地考察，现在，我公司认为你们的项目很有发展潜力，所以基本同意贵公司的贷款申请，不过贷款利率高于同期银行贷款利率0.3个百分点。
男：是吗？我们接受这个利率标准，非常感谢贵公司的信任和支持。
女：在发放贷款之前，我还需要跟贵公司确认一下支付方式，要转账的企业账户名就是西安市中原文化发展有限公司，是吧?
男：对，是中国工商银行的账户，银行账号是1706022119068060520。
女：我再重复一遍，1706022119068060520。对吧？
男：没错儿，另外，我公司希望下周三之前就能够签订正式的贷款合同。
女：如果没有什么意外的话，我想没有问题。
男：我听说贵公司有2个工作日内快速贷款的业务，不知道我们公司是否可以得到这样的快速贷款?
女：是这样的，2个工作日的快速贷款业务目前只受理北京地区的客户，而且要能提供房产、汽车等抵押物。贵公司的200万贷款在签订正式合同后十日之内，我们就可以把钱打到你们的账户里了。
男：我明白了，谢谢！那么就等你们的电话了。
女：好的，有什么问题我们再联系，再见！
essays.summary: A professional phone call from a lending company to the loan applicant. Covers approval notification, interest rate announcement, account verification with read-back protocol, contract signing timeline, and eligibility clarification for express service.
essays.why_study: Essential model for financial/banking phone dialogue register. Demonstrates: how to state approval conditionally (基本同意…不过…), account number read-back (我再重复一遍), polite timeline request (我公司希望…之前就能够签订), and how to inquire about additional services politely (我听说贵公司有…，不知道…是否可以). Dense with banking and business vocabulary.
key_devices: Standard phone opening: 您好，这里是XX公司 / 我就是XX
Conditional approval: 基本同意…不过贷款利率高于…
Account verification read-back: 我再重复一遍，…，对吧？
Polite timeline push: 我公司希望下周三之前就能够签订正式的贷款合同
Hedged confirmation: 如果没有什么意外的话，我想没有问题
Soft inquiry about extra service: 我听说贵公司有…，不知道我们是否可以…

essays.title: 伯乐与千里马——魔方面试
essays.text: 有一次我面试一位初试合格的应聘者，我的测试题目是给他一个魔方，问他能不能把它弄成六面六个颜色。他拿着魔方，面有难色。我对他说：“如果你没有考虑好，可以把魔方拿回去考虑，直到星期五。”同事问我为什么出这个考题。我是这样考虑的，如果他把魔方拆开，然后一个个安上去，这就说明他敢作敢为，就可以从事开拓市场方面的工作：如果他拿漆把六面刷出来，说明他很有创意，可以从事软件开发部的工作；如果他当天下午就把魔方拿回来，说明他非常聪明，领悟能力强，可以做我的助理；如果他星期三之前把魔方拿回来，说明他请教了人，也就是说他很有人缘，可以去客户服务部工作：如果在周五之前拿回来，说明他勤劳肯干，从事低级程序员的工作没问题；如果他最终拿回来说他还是不会，那说明他人很老实，可以从事保管或财物方面的工作：如果他拿不回来，那我就爱莫能助了。
essays.summary: A hiring manager recounts giving a Rubik's cube to a job candidate and explains how different possible solutions would map to different departmental placements — decoding creative thinking, problem-solving style, social skills, work ethic, and honesty from a single ambiguous test.
essays.why_study: Excellent narrative model for workplace humor and insight. The repeated 如果…，说明他…，可以从事… conditional branching creates elegant parallel structure analyzing character through behavior. Introduces key HR and professional personality vocabulary. Good model for writing assessment frameworks or presenting decision logic.
key_devices: Repeated conditional branching: 如果…，说明他…，就可以… — seven parallel branches
Implied humor: the increasingly absurd solutions still earn a job offer
面有难色 — idiom for showing difficulty/reluctance on one's face
敢作敢为, 勤劳肯干, 爱莫能助 — four-character idioms embedded naturally
Understated punchline: 如果他拿不回来，那我就爱莫能助了

essays.title: 天价地板——产品与市场广播采访
essays.text:
女记者：各位听众朋友，大家晚上好。欢迎大家继续收听我们的《产品与市场》节目。最近上海市场出了一款地板，每平米居然卖到了三千多块钱，这么贵的地板能有人买吗？为此，我们来采访一下该企业的严总。

严总：是啊，很多人担心我们的销量，事实上，我们的地板销售一直供货紧张，甚至还常出现脱销的场面。

女记者：那么，贵公司成功的秘诀是什么呢?

严总：总结起来，首先我们的产品定位就是高端用户使用的高档产品，我们开发这款地板的时候，个人家庭用量，只考虑占10%到20%，80%多为机关企业用户。其次，就是注重质量，打造品牌。我们委托德国工厂制造产品，贴自己的品牌。天价地板之所以天价，在于品牌加上特殊原料和工艺。目前全球一年只能生产10万平方米。

女记者：怪不得价钱这么高呢，确实是物有所值。推出这款产品的过程很顺利吗?

严总：说实话，年初我们推出这一款产品时，正好赶上了地板行业价格战，消费者不认可我们的高价位，所以我们尝试突出品牌的环保特色。到11月、12月消费者逐渐认可家装环保的理念了，我们的产品就逐渐被市场所接受了。
essays.summary: A radio interview with the CEO of a premium flooring company whose product sells at 3,000+ RMB per sqm. He explains the premium pricing strategy (high-end product positioning, German OEM manufacturing, scarcity), then describes overcoming initial consumer resistance to high prices by emphasizing eco-friendly features.
essays.why_study: Good model for interview genre: interviewer framing hooks with surprise data (居然卖到了三千多块钱), interviewee uses 总结起来，首先…其次… to organize response. Introduces product positioning vocabulary and the pattern 之所以…在于… for causal explanation. Also models how to acknowledge setbacks (正好赶上了价格战) and narrate recovery.
key_devices: Hook opening using surprising data: 每平米居然卖到了三千多块钱
Interviewer pivot question: 贵公司成功的秘诀是什么呢?
Organized multi-point response: 总结起来，首先…其次…
之所以……在于…… — elegant causal explanation pattern
Acknowledging adversity honestly: 说实话，年初…正好赶上了地板行业价格战
Recovery narration: 逐渐认可…，就逐渐被市场所接受了
物有所值 — idiom for 'worth the price'

essays.title: 关于A1款和C3款手机的销售情况报告
essays.text:
关于A1款和C3款手机的销售情况报告

公司自上个月开展A1和C3两款手机的促销活动以来，总体销售情况良好，受到广泛的关注。销量也比活动前有了明显的上升。但是在销售过程中，我们也听到了不少消费者对这两款产品的意见。主要的意见总结如下：

A1款产品是我公司销售的一款成熟机型，它的特点是显示屏比较大，通话质量好，信号稳定，而且在促销期间价格优惠幅度也比较大，购买这款产品的消费者以老年人为主，而大部分年轻消费者都反映这款产品功能较少，外观式样比较老旧，颜色也不够明亮，还有部分老客户反映这款产品电池待机时间太短。而C3款手机在外观、功能及节电方面都具有优势，但是有部分客户认为这款产品在文字输入以及选择不同功能时操作比较复杂，而且屏幕容量比较小。

针对以上顾客反映比较集中的意见，我们建议厂家应该对这两款产品进行适当的改进。对于A1款产品，可以直接定位为送给父母的手机，更换优质电池。对于C3款手机，在外形方面可以考虑增大屏幕面积，同时简化操作程序。相信改进之后的这两款手机一定会得到更多顾客的认可。
essays.summary: An internal sales report summarizing consumer feedback on two phone models after a promotional campaign. Organizes strengths and weaknesses of each model separately, then concludes with actionable improvement recommendations for the manufacturer.
essays.why_study: Models the standard internal report structure: context/overview → problem feedback organized by product → recommendations. Introduces reusable formulas: 主要的意见总结如下, 针对以上顾客反映比较集中的意见, 我们建议…应该进行适当的改进. The 对于A款…对于C款… parallel structure suits any comparative analysis.
key_devices: Overview acknowledges success before problems: 总体销售情况良好…但是…
Organized per-product feedback: A1款先，C3款后
Formulas: 主要的意见总结如下：; 针对以上…我们建议…
Parallel recommendations: 对于A1款…对于C3款… — symmetric structure
Confident close: 相信改进之后的…一定会得到更多顾客的认可

essays.title: 投资意向询问函（SK投资公司）
essays.text:
李先生：

您好！

我是SK投资公司的项目经理。最近在网上看到您的招商启事，对贵公司的电子项目很有兴趣。本公司正在寻找合适的投资机会，因此去信希望进一步了解贵公司的项目情况，以便确定合作意向。

首先，我们想知道您在启事中提到的国外风险投资公司具体是哪一家公司。其次，还想了解一下贵公司有哪些控制项目风险的措施。另外，该项目的具体内容能不能做更详细的说明。

以上问题希望尽快得到您的答复。如有可能，也可考虑双方进行一次面谈，具体时间请电话联系：12345678。

顺颂
商祺！

王立
2008年10月29日
essays.summary: A brief, focused business inquiry letter from an investment company to a project owner, asking three specific questions about an investment opportunity found online, and proposing a meeting. Demonstrates the formal Chinese business letter format.
essays.why_study: Compact and complete model of a Chinese business inquiry letter. Key reusable elements: 因此去信希望进一步了解…，以便确定合作意向 (purpose statement); 首先…其次…另外… (three questions enumerated formally); 以上问题希望尽快得到您的答复 (closing prompt); 顺颂商祺！(professional business letter closing).
key_devices: Source of contact stated up front: 在网上看到您的招商启事
Purpose statement: 因此去信希望进一步了解…，以便确定合作意向
Three questions via 首先…其次…另外…
Response prompt: 以上问题希望尽快得到您的答复
Meeting proposal: 如有可能，也可考虑双方进行一次面谈
Business letter closing formula: 顺颂商祺！

essays.title: 顺发快餐公司总经理述职报告（范文）
essays.text:
各位同事：

大家好！作为顺发快餐公司总经理，感谢各位今天给我这个机会回顾总结我两年来的工作情况。下面是我的述职报告。

我是2007年8月1日开始担任现职的，至今已经整整两年时间了。在公司全体员工的支持和帮助下我们取得了一些成绩，总结起来，主要有以下几点，一是加大投入提高菜品的质量，尽量采购优质原料，严格卫生管理。二是招聘了部分员工，送货车辆改自行车为摩托车，提高了送餐速度。三是努力拓展市场，在过去的两年里共增开了6家连锁店，业务范围也拓展到了海外市场，这大大提升了我们的品牌知名度，在消费者中间树立了良好的品牌形象。

在工作中也存在着一些问题，主要的问题有两个，一是公司规模不断扩大，但利润增长不明显，主要的原因是在提高产品质量的同时造成成本提高。二是由于业务量的快速增加，造成员工的工作量加大，工作时间延长，有些员工有抱怨的情绪。因此在今后的工作中，要努力降低成本，提高工作效率。争取尽快提高利润，增加员工福利。

以上是简单的工作汇报，请董事会和全体员工审核。
essays.summary: A sample work report by the GM of a fast-food chain covering two years: three numbered achievements (quality, speed, market expansion) followed by two acknowledged problems (weak profit growth, increased staff workload), with remedial commitments.
essays.why_study: A shorter, more conversational version of the 述职报告 genre — good to compare with the construction company example. Uses 一是…二是…三是… (inline) as an alternative to numbered headings. The problem section is candid (员工有抱怨的情绪) — models how to acknowledge internal tension professionally.
key_devices: Opening: 感谢各位今天给我这个机会回顾总结…
Tenure statement: 我是XXXX年XX月XX日开始担任现职的，至今已经整整两年
Alternative enumeration: 一是…二是…三是… (inline, not headings)
Problem acknowledgment: 在工作中也存在着一些问题，主要的问题有两个
Causal chain: 由于业务量的快速增加，造成…
Closing: 以上是简单的工作汇报，请董事会和全体员工审核

essays.title: 深发公司薪资水平图表分析
essays.text: 图1显示，深发公司不同的职务/岗位的薪资水平有很大的差异。图中列举了13种岗位及其他岗位的薪资水平，其中年薪在5万元以上的岗位有两个，一是项目管理，平均薪资水平为53573.23元，投资管理岗位的薪资最高，达到58129.81元。薪资水平在4万到5万元之间的岗位有5个，按从高到低的顺序排列，依次是高级分析师、销售、市场和公关、证券投资分析、研究与发展和项目监控。薪资水平在3万到4万元之间的岗位有4个，从高到低依次是后勤采购、法律事务、人力资源和教育培训以及财务、会计、商务。薪资水平最低的岗位是行政管理和文秘，年薪分别为29898.7元和26017.87元。从图1中可以看出，管理类的岗位薪资明显高于从事具体工作的岗位，薪资水平差距超过一倍。从图2可以明显地看到，学历和薪资水平有很大的关系，学历越高，年平均薪资就越高。硕士和博士学历的职员年薪都在5万元以上，博士稍高，二者差距不大。本科学历的职员年薪为41108.55元，而大专和大专以下学历的人薪资明显降低，均不到3万元。值得注意的是，拥有MBA学历的职员薪资水平明显高于博士学历的人，达到了70654.1元。
essays.summary: A factual description of two salary charts: Chart 1 shows salary by job function (management types earn far more than operational roles), Chart 2 shows salary by educational level with the notable finding that MBA holders significantly out-earn PhD holders.
essays.why_study: Excellent model for graph/chart description writing. The formulas are entirely reusable: 图X显示…; 其中…有X个，一是…，…薪资最高，达到…; 按从高到低的顺序排列，依次是…; 从图X中可以看出…; 值得注意的是…. These phrases form the skeleton of any data narrative essay in Chinese.
key_devices: Chart introduction: 图1显示，…有很大的差异
Selective highlight: 其中年薪在X以上的岗位有两个，一是…，…薪资最高，达到…
Ordered list formula: 按从高到低的顺序排列，依次是…
Trend observation: 从图X中可以看出，…明显高于…
Correlation statement: 学历越高，年平均薪资就越高
Notable exception: 值得注意的是，…明显高于…，达到了…

essays.title: 李新红升职受挫（节选，开头残缺）
essays.text:
[注：本段为课文节选，文件开头被截断，李新红的背景介绍部分缺失。]

地区业务开拓的管理者。她觉得自已工作经验丰富，工作业绩十分出色，人缘也好，升职的时机应该已经成熟，而她渴望的职位也恰好因现任怀孕辞职而空缺，同事们纷纷在私下里拍着她的肩祝贺她，李新红自己也觉得，这次的升职机会非她莫属。然而，正当李新红以为将要梦想成真时，公司竟向外界打出了招聘副总经理的广告，新来的副总经理很快就上任了。极度失落的李新红实在难以接受这个挫折。她思前想后，很不甘心。她想，最好最快的升职办法就是换一家公司，可是，令她举棋不定的是，自己到了新的公司，对企业文化不了解，一切都要从头开始。要不留在现在的公司再等等，说不定很快又会等到本公司的升职机会。究竟该何去何从呢？她一时拿不定主意，就去咨询了一位就业专家。

就业专家在与李新红进行了深入的沟通后发现，导致她升职受挫的原因出在沟通上。李新红虽然业绩出色，但在沟通方面有所欠缺：李新红觉得自己可以升职，但没有考虑公司是怎么想的，会不会提升她，她怕直接谈升职会给老板造成急功近利的印象，不敢主动争取，以至于错失良机。

随后的一个月里，李新红吸取了以往的经验教训，主动和老板沟通了自已想要提升的愿望，老板表示考虑过要提升她，但觉得她在原岗位能为公司获得更多利润，因此不打算给她升职。随后，李新红开始寻找新公司，凭借其实力和努力，她很快便通过猎头公司得到了一个不错的受聘机会，随即向原公司递交了辞呈，到新公司展开了全新的职业生活。
essays.summary: Li Xinhong, an outstanding regional business manager, is passed over for promotion when her company hires externally. She consults a career expert who identifies poor upward communication as the cause. After a candid conversation with her boss, she learns her job is too valuable to lose, so she uses a headhunter to find a new role and resigns.
essays.why_study: Rich narrative prose with high density of idioms in natural context: 非她莫属, 举棋不定, 何去何从, 急功近利, 以至于, 错失良机, 思前想后 all appear authentically. Also demonstrates the real-world career advice genre. The final paragraph's resolution arc is a clean model for narrating professional decisions.
key_devices: Idiom cluster: 非她莫属, 举棋不定, 何去何从 all in one passage — natural density
Causal diagnosis: 导致她升职受挫的原因出在沟通上
以至于…错失良机 — result-to-extreme construction
凭借其实力和努力 — attributive 凭借 phrase
Resolution narration: 随后…随即… — rapid sequence markers
向原公司递交了辞呈 — collocative expression for formal resignation

grammar.explanation: Emphatic exclusive: 'none other than A / it can only be A / A is the one and only candidate.' Used for people or things that are the uniquely appropriate choice. Formal but widely used.
examples: 这次的升职机会非她莫属。— This promotion can only go to her.
能完成这项任务的人非你莫属。— You are the only one who can complete this task.
我认为“中华第一古都”非西安莫属。— I believe Xi'an is unquestionably China's foremost ancient capital.

grammar.explanation: Connective meaning 'to the point where / so much so that / as a result.' Introduces a consequence that follows from the preceding situation, often extreme or unexpected. More literary than 所以.
examples: 她怕直接谈升职会给老板造成急功近利的印象，不敢主动争取，以至于错失良机。
北京因为常常堵车堵得很厉害，以至于被叫做“首堵”。
昨天爬山回来后腿太疼了，以至于都上不了楼了。

grammar.explanation: Resultative idiom: 'come in handy / prove useful / be put to good use.' Can be negated: 派不上用场 (of no use). Often used with 把 or as a verb complement.
examples: 全英文的工作环境使她出色的英语能力派上了用场。
把这笔钱存到银行里去，以后一定会派上用场的。
我一点儿都不懂他们的业务，去了也派不上用场。

grammar.explanation: Metaphorical expression: 'reach a dead end / run its course / have no more road ahead.' Used for strategies, relationships, or situations that have exhausted their potential.
examples: 依靠低成本优势拓展市场的路已经走到尽头了。
他们整天吵架，婚姻已经走到了尽头，只有选择离婚。
这款旧商品在市场上已经走到尽头了。

grammar.explanation: Discourse connectives for enumeration and sequential ordering. Essential structure for reports, proposals, and explanatory texts. 首先/其次 can rank by importance rather than time.
examples: 中国品牌的提升首先应该注重产品质量，其次要提高产品技术含量，然后要在拥有自主知识产权的基础上提升产品形象。
首先，我们想知道…；其次，还想了解一下…；另外，该项目的具体内容能不能做更详细的说明。
首先，我报告一下履行职责的情况。

grammar.explanation: Developmental trajectory pattern: 'go from A toward B / transition from A to B.' Used for discussing evolution, strategic direction, or industry trends. B represents a desirable destination; A is the current or past state.
examples: 中国产品要从“中国制造”到“中国创造”，最终走向优质高价的品牌。
很多高新技术正在从实验室走向市场，创造价值。
我们的产品要发展，必须从模仿走向创新。

grammar.explanation: Formal verbal construction: 进行 + abstract action verb indicates a formal, sustained, or official undertaking. Cannot be used with all verbs — only those representing formal/prolonged activities (培训, 审核, 沟通, 改进, 调查, 谈判). Adds formality preferred in written/official register.
examples: 我公司对这些资料进行了仔细审核和实地考察。
对原有产品的颜色、造型及其包装进行改进，以适应当地消费者的需求。
就业专家在与李新红进行了深入的沟通后发现，……

grammar.explanation: Formal connective meaning 'in order to / so as to.' Appears between a verb phrase and its purpose, equivalent to 为了 but more literary. Common in written/formal register. Pattern: [action clause]，以[purpose].
examples: 对原有产品的颜色、造型及其包装进行改进，以适应当地消费者的需求和爱好。
如果企业实力雄厚…应该作为一种知识产权在世界各国注册，以获得法律保护。
他坚持每天冷水洗澡，以增强身体的抵抗力。

grammar.explanation: Definition pattern: 'what is meant by X is... / X refers to...' Used to define abstract concepts analytically and with authority. Very effective in expository and argumentative writing when you need to establish shared understanding of a term before arguing about it.
examples: 所谓信誉，就是消费者对企业产品和服务的一种长期认可。
所谓价值，就是企业资产。
所谓拓展培训，就是一种户外体验式培训。

grammar.explanation: Formal causal pattern: 'the reason why...is that...' Highlights the underlying cause of a stated result. More formal and emphatic than 因为…所以…. Often used in explanations, analyses, and justifications.
examples: 天价地板之所以天价，在于品牌加上特殊原料和工艺。
失败之所以发生，在于沟通的缺失。
产品之所以能打入国际市场，在于其过硬的质量和合理的价格。

grammar.explanation: Literary conditional: 如果 introduces the condition; 则 (instead of 就) introduces the consequence. 则 is a formal written marker, not used in spoken Chinese. Common in contracts, reports, policy texts, and business writing.
examples: 如果企业实力雄厚，产品在国际上已有知名度，则不仅不需要改变产品品牌和商标，而且应该…在世界各国注册。
如果企业实力不强，产品质量较高但缺乏知名度，则应考虑选择一家有名的生产同类产品的企业。

grammar.explanation: Additive progressive connective: 'not only...but also...' The second clause adds something more significant or surprising. Very common in formal writing.
examples: 不仅不需要改变产品品牌和商标，而且应该作为一种知识产权在世界各国注册。
她不仅业绩出色，而且人缘好，升职的时机已经成熟。
麦当劳的成功不仅带动了美式快餐的扩张，而且带动了中式快餐业的发展。

grammar.explanation: Formal prepositional phrase: 'on the premise of / provided that / without compromising.' Sets a condition that must not be violated while the main action is carried out. Very common in business and policy writing.
examples: 在保证工程进度的前提下，仅水电一项就节省开支200万元。
在不影响员工福利的前提下，公司将努力降低运营成本。
在保证质量的前提下尽量降低生产成本。

grammar.explanation: Attributive/instrumental phrase: 'by means of / relying on / by virtue of.' Indicates the resource, skill, or advantage that enables the main action. More formal than 靠.
examples: 李新红凭借其实力和努力，很快便通过猎头公司得到了一个不错的受聘机会。
他凭借这个品牌，不用一周就可以在全世界重建帝国。
凭借20年的从业经验，他成为了行业内最受尊重的专家之一。

grammar.explanation: Progressive intensification: 'more and more / increasingly.' Used with adjectives or verb phrases to indicate a continuing trend.
examples: 目前越来越多的中国企业已经意识到了自有品牌的重要性。
消费者对环保产品的需求越来越强烈。
这种贸易保护主义的倾向愈强，反倾销就越来越成为各国的主要手段。

grammar.explanation: Targeting phrase: 'in response to / targeting / addressing...' Introduces the specific problem or audience being addressed before stating the response. Very common in business reports, policy, and analysis.
examples: 针对以上顾客反映比较集中的意见，我们建议厂家应该对这两款产品进行适当的改进。
针对消费者的需求，厂商往往要在同一产品上增加或减少一部分功能。
针对公司在市场开发方面做得不够的问题，下一步的工作重点是要加大宣传力度。

expr.meaning: Aim even higher; reach a new level above what one has already achieved. From Tang poet Wang Zhihuan.
None other than A; A is the one and only appropriate choice. Formal emphasis idiom.
Hesitate over which move to make; be unable to decide. Lit. 'to hold a chess piece without placing it.'
What course to follow; which direction to go (at a crossroads). Often used for major life/career decisions.
Eager for quick success and instant benefits; impatient for results; short-termist. Pejorative in business context.
Miss a golden opportunity. Common in career and business contexts.
Think it over from all angles; weigh it thoroughly back and forth. Used when someone deliberates at length.
Change rapidly day by day and month by month; advancing at tremendous speed (of technology, business).
Greatly beneficial; of great benefit. 裨益 is formal for 益处.
Willing but unable to help; 'I wish I could help but my hands are tied.'
Completely vanished; utterly gone. Used for abstract things (reputation, advantages) that have entirely disappeared.
Run counter to; go in the exact opposite direction. Used when actions contradict stated goals.
In the final analysis; when all is said and done; at the root of it all.
Bold and decisive; willing to act and take responsibility. Positive personality descriptor.
Hardworking and willing to put in effort. Standard positive character descriptor in HR/work contexts.
Worth the price; you get what you pay for. Used to justify premium pricing.
Business is thriving / may your business prosper. Standard blessing formula for new businesses.
Lit. 'gold-lettered signboard.' A prestigious, reputable brand or name that carries inherent trust and credibility.
Uneven; of mixed quality; scattered and irregular (of people's abilities, work quality, etc.).
Independent innovation; self-driven R&D. Key concept in China's industrial policy; appears in government documents and business strategy.
Well-known trademark; a legally recognized brand of national or international repute. Has specific regulatory meaning in China.
Own brand; private brand; a brand owned by the manufacturer rather than a licensed brand.
Intellectual property rights (IPR). Umbrella term covering patents (专利), trademarks (商标), and copyright (版权).
Chain operation; franchise business model. Broader than 特许经营 (franchise specifically).
Franchise operation; licensed business operation. More specific legal/commercial term than 连锁经营.
Headhunting company; executive search firm. 猎头 (lit. 'headhunting') is the standard Chinese term for this industry.
Anti-dumping. Legal/trade measure taken by an importing country to counteract below-cost exports.
Brand image. The perception of a brand held by consumers.
Technological content / technological sophistication. Refers to how much advanced technology is embedded in a product.
Open up a market channel; break into a new market. 销路 = market outlet.
Break into the international market. 打入 connotes overcoming resistance.
Build/establish a brand. 树立 is more formal and purposeful than 建立 in this collocation.
Apply for a patent. Standard collocation.
Conduct a review/audit. Formal 进行 construction used in institutional contexts.
On-site inspection / due diligence field visit.
Submit materials/documents.
Sign a contract. Fixed collocation; 签 alone can also be used but 签订 is more formal.
Work accountability report; the formal spoken/written report given by a manager reviewing their term in office.
Increase investment/input. 加大 (intensify) + 投入 (input/investment). Common in reports.
Reduce costs. Standard business strategy collocation.
Improve efficiency.
Expand the market. 拓展 is more dynamic/intentional than 扩大, implying new territory.
Learn from experience/mistakes; draw lessons from setbacks.
Popularity; good interpersonal relationships; the ability to get along well with others. 人缘好 = popular/well-liked.
By virtue of; relying on; by means of. More formal than 靠 or 通过 in many contexts.
Prepare; make preparations for (a company, event, project). More thorough/formal than 准备.
Business license. Required document to legally operate a business in China.
Go through company registration procedures. Standard collocation for officially registering a company.
Invest and take shares; invest to become a shareholder. Common in joint venture contexts.
Formal business letter closing: 'wishing you commercial success / may your business prosper.' Used only in formal B2B correspondence.
May your career/undertaking thrive and grow steadily. Common closing blessing in job applications and formal letters.
Respectfully submitted (by [name]). Closing signature formula for formal letters. More deferential than just signing one's name.

expr.zh: 贵公司 / 贵社 / 贵单位
expr.pinyin: guì gōngsī / guì shè / guì dānwèi
expr.meaning: Your esteemed company / your esteemed publisher / your esteemed organization. Mandatory honorific in formal B2B Chinese correspondence.
High-end users; premium customers. Used in product positioning and market segmentation.
Price war. Competitive situation where businesses undercut each other on price.
Sky-high price; astronomical price. Often used with 居然 to express surprise.
Product positioning. How a product is placed in the market relative to competitors and target segments.
Values (as a system); value orientation. Used in corporate culture and team-building contexts.
Cohesion; centripetal force (of a team or organization). 凝聚力强 = high cohesion.
Tacit cooperation; seamless teamwork without needing explicit communication.
Work performance; achievements; results. 业绩出色/突出 = outstanding performance.
Compensation package; total remuneration (salary + benefits). More formal/comprehensive than 工资 or 薪水.
Competitive appointment to a position; open competition for a management post within an organization.
Show a look of difficulty or reluctance on one's face; visibly hesitate or struggle.
Deal with; have dealings with (people or organizations). 少不了和…打交道 = inevitably have to deal with…
Aesthetic sensibility / aesthetic values. Used in design, culture, and marketing contexts.
Outward-bound / outdoor experiential training. Corporate team-building program involving physical challenges.
Team spirit; sense of teamwork and collective purpose.
Wrap-up work; finishing / close-out tasks on a project.
Franchise agreement; the contract between franchisor and franchisee.
Middleman; intermediary; agent/jobber in a supply chain.
Depend on; hinge on. Formal written connective used to introduce what determines a variable outcome.

takeaways: GENRE — 述职报告 (work accountability speech): Mandatory structure: [formal address + greeting] → [role + scope statement] → [numbered achievement sections] → [problems section: 回顾检查存在的问题，我认为主要有两点：] → [future commitments] → [formal close: 以上是我的述职报告，请各位领导…进行审议监督。谢谢大家！]. The problems section is essential — omitting it signals overconfidence. Two versions in this file show the same arc in different registers (formal numbered headings vs inline 一是…二是…三是…).

GENRE — 辞呈 (formal resignation letter): Mandatory moves in order: (1) 感谢 the trust/care received, (2) describe what you gained (personal growth, skills), (3) give a diplomatic non-blame reason, (4) apologize for inconvenience and request understanding, (5) state two-week transition timeline (我会在两周后离开公司，以便完成工作交接), (6) final blessing for the company and colleagues. Closing: 顺祝安好！[name] [date].

GENRE — 求职信 (job application letter): Mandatory moves: (1) state how you found the ad + which position you want, (2) education + relevant experience (specific role, duration, what you gained, external validation), (3) skills + personality traits, (4) confident self-assessment (我认为自己是非常适合该岗位的人选), (5) mention attached resume (随信附上本人的简历，望查收), (6) seasonal blessing: 祝贵社事业蒸蒸日上！(7) 敬祝[季节]安！+ 姓名敬上 + date.

GENRE — business inquiry letter (询问函): Structure: [identify yourself + how you found the opportunity] → [purpose clause: 以便确定合作意向] → [three questions via 首先/其次/另外] → [prompt for quick response] → [offer to meet: 如有可能，也可考虑双方进行一次面谈] → [顺颂商祺！+ 姓名 + date]. Use 贵公司/贵社 throughout for the recipient.

HONORIFICS in B2B correspondence: Refer to the other party as 贵公司 (company), 贵社 (publisher/press), or 贵单位 (organization). Refer to your own side as 本公司 or 我公司 — never 你们公司. This asymmetry is obligatory and signals professional competence.

LETTER CLOSING FORMULAS matched to context: 顺颂商祺！= pure B2B business letters. 顺祝安好！or 顺祝冬安/春安！= personal/semi-personal professional letters (job applications, resignations). 事业蒸蒸日上！= blessing for career/business flourishing. 祝工作顺利！= general-purpose. Always place the blessing BEFORE the signature, not after. The seasonal closings (冬安 = winter peace, 春安 = spring peace) are a classical epistolary tradition still used in formal Chinese letters.

DEFINITION DEVICE — 所谓X，就是……: Use this to define abstract business concepts with authority before arguing about them. Example: 所谓信誉，就是消费者对企业产品和服务的一种长期认可. Repeat in sequence for parallel definitions (the brand essay does this twice consecutively). This device signals analytical clarity and elevates expository register.

ARGUMENTATIVE ESSAY STRUCTURE (expository/analytical): Lead with tension (尽管…但…), establish stakes with concrete data (numbers, case examples), define key concepts (所谓…就是…), present argument from two perspectives (对于消费者来说…对于企业而言…), prescribe steps (首先/其次/然后), close with developmental arc (从A走向B). This complete template appears in the brand essay and is directly imitable.

BALANCED ANALYSIS structure: Open with a well-known success case to establish the concept → state benefits explicitly → pivot with 但是 → give risks/downsides → clinch with a concrete failure case narrative. The franchise text demonstrates this cleanly: Zhang's decorative shop fails without editorializing. Ending on the failure case is more persuasive than moralizing commentary.

DATA/CHART DESCRIPTION formulas: 图X显示，…有很大的差异 (intro); 其中…在X以上的岗位有两个，一是…，…最高，达到… (highlight); 按从高到低的顺序排列，依次是… (ordered list); 从图X中可以看出，A明显高于B (observation); 学历越高，年平均薪资就越高 (correlation); 值得注意的是，… (notable exception). These six sentence frames handle most business data narrative needs.

FORMAL REPORT LANGUAGE — 进行 + V: Substitute 进行 + abstract noun/verb for bare verbs in official contexts: 进行审核 (not just 审核), 进行沟通 (not just 沟通), 进行培训 (not just 培训), 进行改进 (not just 改进). This single substitution substantially elevates register in any business report or institutional communication.

PURPOSE CONNECTIVE — 以 vs 为了: In formal written Chinese, prefer 以 over 为了 when connecting an action clause to its purpose: 进行改进，以适应当地消费者的需求 (not 为了适应). 以 is more compact and literary. It cannot begin a sentence — it always follows the action clause.

FORMAL CONDITIONAL — 则 vs 就: In formal written Chinese (contracts, reports, policy texts), use 则 instead of 就 in the result clause of if-then structures: 如果实力不强，则应考虑…. Use 就 in spoken and informal written contexts. This choice is a reliable signal of register control.

CAUSAL EMPHASIS — 之所以A，在于B: This is more analytical and emphatic than 因为B，所以A. Use it when foregrounding the explanation as the key insight (especially for success factors, pricing rationale, strategic decisions). Example from the flooring interview: 天价地板之所以天价，在于品牌加上特殊原料和工艺.

PARALLEL TRICOLON for emphasis: Deploy three parallel elements for rhetorical power: 品牌是一种信誉、一种价值和一种力量 (noun tricolon); 赢得市场，赢得利润，赢得客户 (verb-object tricolon). Tricolon creates rhythm, memorability, and the sense of completeness. This structure appears naturally in the brand essay and is directly imitable in business presentations and reports.

CAREER COMMUNICATION insight from Li Xinhong narrative: The text explicitly diagnoses her failure as lack of upward communication (不敢主动争取，以至于错失良机), not lack of performance. In Chinese professional culture, silently assuming one's merits will be recognized is a strategic error. This is a reusable analytical frame for writing about workplace dynamics, career management, or professional development.

IDIOM DEPLOYMENT in narrative: The Li Xinhong story clusters 非她莫属, 举棋不定, 何去何从, 急功近利, 以至于错失良机, 思前想后 naturally within two paragraphs. Study this passage to see how idioms deploy in connected prose — not isolated and labeled, but woven into causal and emotional narrative logic.

INTERVIEW GENRE structure: Hook with a surprising datum → pose the central question (贵公司成功的秘诀是什么呢?) → organized multi-point response (总结起来，首先…其次…) → follow-up about setbacks → candid acknowledgment + recovery narrative. This pattern works for any media interview, Q&A, or spokespersonship scenario in Chinese.

essays.title: 史密斯先生和房东的看房对话
essays.genre: 口语对话 / Spoken dialogue (renting an apartment)
essays.text:
（史密斯先生和房东在看房子）
房东：这套房子我刚装修过，家具和各种电器几乎都是新的。
史密斯：不错，房子宽敞舒适，也很安静，我很满意。这个小区的治安怎么样？
房东：这儿的治安很好，不用担心安全问题。
史密斯：那我就放心了。房租是多少？
房东：租金是每个月5000元，每三个月付一次；另外您还要付5000元的押金。
史密斯：房租包括物业费、水费、电费在内吗？
房东：房租只包括物业费，水费、电费和煤气费都要您自己付。
史密斯：我们要签一份租房协议是吧？
房东：对，房租和押金会写在协议里。
史密斯：我什么时候可以搬进来？
房东：这套房子现在空着，签了协议您随时都可以住进来。
essays.summary: A foreign tenant (Mr. Smith) inspects a furnished apartment with the landlord, asking about the neighbourhood security, rent amount, payment schedule, deposit, included utilities, the lease agreement, and move-in timing.
essays.why_study: A compact, complete model for real-estate negotiation dialogue. Covers the full arc of a rental inquiry from first impression to closing logistics. The language is natural, practical, and models the polite but direct register appropriate for a foreigner renting in China.
key_devices: Topic-chaining: each Smith question naturally follows from the landlord's answer, modelling smooth conversational flow
包括...在内吗? as a standard inclusion-checking question
签了协议您随时都可以住进来 — conditional clause + 随时 for open availability
那我就放心了 — formulaic reassurance response after receiving good news
不用担心...问题 — common reassurance formula

essays.title: 东方商务写字楼招商广告
essays.genre: 商业广告 / Business property advertisement
essays.text:
东方商务写字楼，位于青年大街127号，东风桥往北50米，在城市商业中心区，临近地铁四号线，有多路公交车可以直达，地理位置好，交通便利。
写字楼建筑面积21,000平方米，地下两层，是车库和超市，有停车位188个；地上21层，单层建筑面积830平方米，一层是多功能商务会议中心，2层以上招商，租金为25美元/平方米/月。
写字楼配有电话、宽带网络、中央空调，附近有银行、邮局、超市和麦当劳等餐厅，能为您提供一个安全、舒适、便利的办公环境。现在已有多家著名企业入住。
招商电话：87821625
传真：87821626
essays.summary: A commercial real-estate advertisement for Dongfang Business Tower: location and transit access, building specs (floors, area, parking), facilities, surrounding amenities, rental rate, and contact details.
essays.why_study: A complete, well-structured Chinese commercial property ad. The three-paragraph structure (location → specs → facilities/environment) is the standard template for office-building marketing copy and can be directly imitated. The language is formal-promotional with dense noun phrases.
key_devices: 位于...，临近...，交通便利 — standard Chinese location formula: address → landmark → proximity to transit → evaluation
配有 — 'equipped with' (formal alternative to 有)
能为您提供... — 'can provide you with...' — standard service-sector promotional phrase
现在已有多家著名企业入住 — social proof as a closing device
地下...层...地上...层 — floor-by-floor building breakdown pattern
租金为...美元/平方米/月 — unit pricing formula standard in commercial leasing

essays.title: 出租房屋广告（天河小区）
essays.genre: 分类广告 / Classified rental advertisement (prose paragraph form)
essays.text:
出租房屋
东山区中山路20号天河小区，两室一厅，每月房租2600元，包括水电费、宽带费、有线电视费、物业费，月付。家电、家具齐全。附近有天河公园，周边环境优美，治安好。有意者请和我联系，看房请提前预约。1361238651 陈小姐
essays.summary: A short paragraph-form classified ad for a two-bedroom apartment: address, layout, rent, what is included, payment terms, furnishing, surrounding environment, and contact.
essays.why_study: Models the compact Chinese classified-ad genre: every slot (location, layout, price, inclusions, environment, contact) appears in minimum words. Ideal for learning how to write or decode Chinese property listings.
key_devices: 包括...，月付 — rent inclusions listed without repeating the subject
家电、家具齐全 — set phrase meaning 'fully equipped with appliances and furniture'
有意者请和我联系 — formal call-to-action: '有意者' (interested parties) is the correct register for ads
看房请提前预约 — practical qualifier at the end of the ad

essays.title: 出租房屋广告（海珠花园，包含押金说明）
essays.genre: 分类广告 / Classified rental advertisement (prose paragraph form with deposit clause)
essays.text: 静安区东广路33号海珠花园小区2层3室1厅1卫，95平方米，精装修，南北朝向。水、电、煤气、ADSL；电器、家具齐全。租金4500元/月，季付；押金为一个月房租，三个月起租。联系人：张小姐 81679321
essays.summary: A compact rental ad specifying apartment size, orientation, finish level, utilities, furnishing, monthly rent, payment frequency (quarterly), deposit terms (one month's rent), minimum lease term (3 months), and contact.
essays.why_study: More information-dense than the previous ad and explicitly models how to state deposit terms (押金为一个月房租) and minimum lease period (三个月起租) — both highly practical for real-life rental situations in China.
key_devices: 精装修 vs 一般装修 vs 毛坯房 — the three renovation-level terms in Chinese real estate
押金为一个月房租 — deposit specification formula
三个月起租 — minimum lease-period formula using 起
季付 — 'quarterly payment' — alongside 月付, 半年付, 年付 as standard payment frequencies

essays.title: 租房协议（标准模板）
essays.genre: 法律文书 / Lease agreement template
essays.text:
甲方（出租方）：
乙方（承租方）：
身份证号码：
身份证号码：
甲方将位于___区___路___号___号楼___单元___户的房屋出租给乙方使用。乙方已对房屋做了充分了解，愿意承租该房。
二、双方议定的上述房屋租金为___。租赁期限自___年___月___日至___年___月___日。租金每四个月付一次。另外，乙方需交纳押金___。
三、乙方保证承租上述房屋仅做居住使用，因使用不当或其他人为原因使房屋或设施损坏的，乙方负责赔偿或修复。乙方将在租赁期满时把房屋交还给甲方。如需继续承租上述房屋或提前退房，应提前___天与甲方协商。
四、要爱惜使用房内设施及物品，如有损毁，请按下列约定赔偿价格：[损毁赔偿表]
五、乙方在租赁期间，水、电、煤气按实际使用量自付。卫生费、治安费、有线电视费、物业管理费等费用包含在房租里。
六、乙方不得利用租赁房屋从事违法、犯罪活动，不得影响邻里生活、休息。
七、违约责任：任何一方未能履行本协议规定，另方有权解除本协议，所造成的损失由责任一方承担。
本协议一式___份，双方各执___份。
出租方（签章）：___
承租方（签章）：___
___年___月___日
essays.summary: A standard seven-clause residential lease agreement template: party identification, address/consent, rent and deposit terms, permitted use and damage liability, item-by-item damages schedule, utility split, prohibited activities, breach-of-contract liability, and signature block.
essays.why_study: The only legal-register text in this chunk. Exposes the fixed structure and formulaic language of Chinese private lease contracts — 甲方/乙方, 承租方/出租方, 一式___份双方各执___份 — all are recurring patterns in Chinese legal and business documents of any type.
key_devices: 甲方/乙方 — Party A/Party B: universal in Chinese contracts regardless of transaction type
承租方 vs 出租方 — morphologically transparent: 承(承受) = receive, 出(出让) = give out
因使用不当或其他人为原因...负责赔偿或修复 — liability clause pattern
按实际使用量自付 — 'pay according to actual usage' — standard utility split clause
违约责任：...有权解除本协议，所造成的损失由责任一方承担 — standard breach clause
一式___份，双方各执___份 — 'executed in N copies, one for each party' — universal contract closing
愿意承租该房 — formal consent language using 该 (said/the above-mentioned)

essays.title: 售票处购买火车票对话
essays.genre: 口语对话 / Spoken dialogue (train ticket counter)
essays.text:
（火车票售票窗口）
男：你好！买两张14号去长沙的车票，一张卧铺和一张硬座。
女：到长沙有三趟车，两趟特快，一趟普快，您想坐哪趟？
男：这几趟车到长沙要多长时间？
女：特快要15个小时，普快20多个小时。
男：两趟特快什么时候发车？
女：一趟是T1次，13点发车；另一趟是T145次，15点发车。
男：嗯，我就买T145次，这趟车时间比较合适。
女：卧铺您想要上铺、中铺还是下铺？
男：中铺。
女：我重复一遍：14号T145次到长沙的硬卧中铺一张、硬座一张。没有问题的话就出票了。
男：没问题，出票吧。一共多少钱？
女：卧铺票是346元，硬座191，加上10块钱手续费，一共是547。
essays.summary: A male customer buys two train tickets (one sleeper berth, one hard seat) to Changsha for the 14th. The ticket clerk explains train types and schedules, confirms the berth preference, reads back the order, and states the total price including the service fee.
essays.why_study: Models the complete ticket-purchase interaction: stating destination + date + quantity + class, eliciting options, confirming choices, and handling the read-back confirmation (重复一遍). The clerk's read-back is an especially useful real-world pattern.
key_devices: 买两张14号去[目的地]的车票，一张[类型]和一张[类型] — standard ticket-purchase opening
两趟特快什么时候发车？ — asking about departure times using 趟 (measure word for trips/trains)
这趟车时间比较合适 — evaluating options with 比较 + adjective
我重复一遍：... — read-back confirmation pattern (crucial in service-industry Chinese)
没有问题的话就... — conditional signalling readiness to proceed
加上...手续费，一共是... — price summary with service charge

essays.title: 电话订购机票对话
essays.genre: 口语对话 / Spoken dialogue (airline ticket phone booking)
essays.text:
女：你好！新时代票务中心。
男：你好！我想订一张7月14号从北京到东京的飞机票。
女：您要单程票还是往返票？
男：单程票，最好是上午的航班。
女：14号上午有两趟航班飞往东京，一趟是中国国际航空公司的CA925次航班，一趟是日本全日空航空公司的NH906次航班。
男：这两趟航班什么时候起飞？
女：CA925次航班9:20起飞，NH906次的起飞时间是11:00。
男：我坐11:00起飞的吧。
女：您想要经济舱还是头等舱？
男：经济舱。
女：好的，请您留下姓名、护照号码和联系方式。
essays.summary: A phone booking for a one-way Beijing–Tokyo flight on July 14th. The agent presents two morning options, the customer selects the 11:00 ANA flight in economy class, and the agent collects personal details to complete the booking.
essays.why_study: Models the complete flight-booking phone call arc. The sequence (destination + date → one-way/return → preferred time → options presented → selection → cabin class → contact details) is the standard Chinese ticket-booking script.
key_devices: 我想订一张[日期]从[出发地]到[目的地]的飞机票 — standard flight-booking opening
您要单程票还是往返票？ — binary choice question pattern in service contexts
最好是上午的航班 — expressing preference with 最好
飞往[目的地] — 'flying to' (more formal/aviation-specific than 去)
请您留下姓名、护照号码和联系方式 — booking-completion request pattern

essays.title: 机场送别对话
essays.genre: 口语对话 / Spoken dialogue (airport farewell)
essays.text:
（在机场）
史密斯：李主任，非常感谢您来机场送我。
李建明：史密斯先生，您太客气了。时间过得真快，一眨眼您就要回国了。
史密斯：是啊，时间过得太快了，还有很多名胜古迹我还没来得及参观呢。
李建明：这次您的日程安排得太紧了。不过没关系，我们双方建立了长期的合作关系，我想您以后会经常来北京出差的。
史密斯：希望是这样。虽然在北京只待了一个星期，但北京给我留下了深刻的印象；同时非常感谢您的帮助，帮了我很多忙。
李建明：这都是我应该做的。您的登机手续都办完了吗？
史密斯：都办完了。我一共有三件行李，托运了两件，这个小箱子我带上飞机。我买了很多纪念品和礼物，行李差点儿超重。
（广播：前往纽约的乘客请注意：您乘坐的CA981次航班现在开始登机。请带好您的随身物品，出示登机牌，由12号登机口上飞机。祝您旅途愉快。）
史密斯：我该上飞机了。
李建明：祝您一路平安！
史密斯：谢谢。再见！
essays.summary: Mr. Smith thanks his Chinese counterpart Mr. Li at the airport. They exchange pleasantries about time passing quickly, discuss the long-term business relationship established, Smith describes his checked luggage and near-overweight situation, a boarding announcement is made, and they exchange formal farewells.
essays.why_study: A model for the formal cross-cultural business farewell: gratitude → reflection on the visit → looking ahead to future cooperation → practical logistics → farewell formula. The embedded airport announcement is also a model of that sub-genre. The dialogue demonstrates how 虽然...但... gracefully acknowledges a limitation (only one week) while emphasising the positive (深刻的印象).
key_devices: 一眨眼...就... — 'in the blink of an eye' + imminent event; vivid, idiomatic time idiom
没来得及 + V — 'didn't have time to V / didn't get around to V-ing'
建立了长期的合作关系 — standard business Chinese phrase for establishing a long-term partnership
虽然...只...，但...给我留下了深刻的印象 — diplomatic concession + positive emphasis
这都是我应该做的 — humble deflection of praise; standard polite response
差点儿 + V — 'almost V-ed (but didn't)'; here 差点儿超重 = almost overweight
祝您一路平安 — the most formal of the farewell wishes; appropriate for business guests

essays.title: 机场广播——登机通知
essays.genre: 官方广播 / Airport public announcement (boarding)
essays.text:
前往东京的乘客请注意：
您乘坐的NH906次航班现在开始登机。请带好您的随身物品，出示登机牌，由12号登机口上飞机。祝您旅途愉快。
谢谢！
essays.summary: A standard boarding announcement: directed to passengers by destination, states the flight number, announces boarding has begun, gives instructions (bring belongings, show boarding pass, gate number), and closes with a polite wish.
essays.why_study: The three-sentence structure is the canonical Chinese boarding announcement template. Every element is formulaic and transferable. Mastering this lets you produce or understand any variation.
key_devices: 前往[目的地]的乘客请注意 — standard Chinese PA opening: 'Passengers to X, please be advised'
您乘坐的[航班号]次航班现在开始登机 — boarding-commencement formula
请带好您的随身物品，出示登机牌，由[X]号登机口上飞机 — three-part instruction sequence
祝您旅途愉快 — polite closing for boarding/departure announcements

essays.title: 机场广播——航班延误通知
essays.genre: 官方广播 / Airport public announcement (flight delay)
essays.text:
前往东京的乘客请注意：
我们很抱歉地通知您，您乘坐的NH906次航班由于飞机在本站出现机械故障不能按时起飞，起飞时间推迟到13点30分。在此我们深表歉意，请您在候机厅休息，等候通知。如果您有什么要求，请与8号服务台工作人员联系。
谢谢！
essays.summary: A delay announcement: apology formula, specific cause (mechanical fault at this station), revised departure time, second apology, instructions (wait in terminal, await further notice), and contact information for the service desk.
essays.why_study: A full-length formal apology announcement. The structure — apology lead-in → cause (由于...) → consequence and revised plan → formal apology (在此深表歉意) → instructions → contact → thanks — is reusable for any formal Chinese apology notice, not just aviation.
key_devices: 我们很抱歉地通知您 — formal apology notification lead-in (more formal than 我们抱歉地告诉您)
由于[原因]，不能按时... — cause-and-effect delay formula
起飞时间推迟到[时间] — delay specification: 推迟到 vs 推迟了
在此我们深表歉意 — 'We hereby express our sincere apologies' — standard formal written/spoken apology
请您在[地点]休息，等候通知 — polite instruction to wait
如果您有什么要求，请与[联系方式]联系 — standard service-escalation contact formula

essays.title: 机场广播——航班取消通知
essays.genre: 官方广播 / Airport public announcement (flight cancellation)
essays.text:
前往东京的乘客请注意：
我们很抱歉地通知您，您乘坐的NH906次航班由于天气原因决定取消今日飞行，请您改乘明日NH906次航班，起飞时间为11点。在此我们深表歉意。如果您有什么问题，请与6号服务台工作人员联系。
谢谢！
essays.summary: A cancellation announcement: cause (weather), cancellation of today's flight, rebooking instruction (改乘 next day's same flight at 11:00), apology, contact.
essays.why_study: Nearly identical structure to the delay announcement but adds 请您改乘... — the rebooking instruction — and uses 决定取消 (officially decided to cancel) vs. the delay's descriptive framing. Studying the pair teaches how to modulate formality and vary a template.
key_devices: 由于天气原因决定取消今日飞行 — 'due to weather conditions, decided to cancel today's flight'
请您改乘[次日/备选]航班 — '改乘' = 'change to / transfer to (another service)' — key transport verb
起飞时间为... — alternative to 起飞时间是: 为 is more formal in notices

grammar.explanation: Inclusive question/statement: 'including X (within/in the total)'. Used to ask or state what a price, package, or scope covers. The item being asked about comes between 包括 and 在内. More specific than just 包括 + object.
examples: 房租包括物业费、水费、电费在内吗？（Does the rent include property management, water, and electricity fees?）
房租只包括物业费，水费、电费和煤气费都要您自己付。（The rent only covers the property management fee; water, electricity, and gas you pay yourself.）

grammar.explanation: 'In the blink of an eye / in no time at all'. A vivid idiomatic time expression marking how quickly time has passed. Followed by 就 + verb phrase. Used when reflecting on a period that felt short.
examples: 时间过得真快，一眨眼您就要回国了。（Time flies; in the blink of an eye you're already heading home.）

grammar.explanation: 'Didn't have time to V / didn't get around to V-ing / didn't manage to V in time'. Expresses a regret that something didn't happen because there wasn't enough time. Contrast with 没有时间 (don't have time) — 没来得及 specifically means the opportunity passed.
examples: 还有很多名胜古迹我还没来得及参观呢。（There are still many historic sites I didn't manage to visit.）

grammar.explanation: 'Almost V-ed (but didn't)' when used without 没; 'just barely V-ed (managed to V)' when used with 没 — a tricky pattern. In everyday speech 差点儿 alone = almost did something undesirable (and didn't). 差点儿没 = almost failed to do something desirable (but succeeded).
examples: 行李差点儿超重。（The luggage was almost overweight / came close to being overweight — but wasn't.）

grammar.explanation: 'Due to [reason], [consequence/decision]'. Formal cause-and-effect structure used in written notices, announcements, and business communications. 原因 may be explicit or omitted. More formal than 因为.
examples: 由于飞机在本站出现机械故障不能按时起飞，起飞时间推迟到13点30分。（Due to a mechanical fault with the aircraft at this station, the departure has been delayed to 13:30.）
由于天气原因决定取消今日飞行。（Due to weather conditions, today's flight has been cancelled.）

grammar.explanation: 'We hereby express our sincere / deepest apologies.' A fixed formal phrase for written and spoken apology in official contexts — airport announcements, business letters, public notices. Much stronger and more formal than 对不起 or 抱歉. 在此 = 'herein/hereby'; 深表 = 'deeply express'.
examples: 在此我们深表歉意，请您在候机厅休息，等候通知。（We hereby sincerely apologise; please wait in the departure lounge and await further notice.）

grammar.pattern: V + 了协议/手续/...（之后），您随时（都）可以...
grammar.explanation: Conditional completion + 随时 for open availability: 'Once you have done X, you can Y at any time.' 随时都可以 emphasises there is no further restriction on timing.
examples: 签了协议您随时都可以住进来。（Once the agreement is signed, you can move in any time.）
办完手续以后，您随时都可以取款。（Once the formalities are complete, you can withdraw money at any time.）

grammar.pattern: 虽然...只...，但...给我留下了深刻的印象
grammar.explanation: Concessive structure acknowledging a limitation (short time, small scope) before emphasising the strong positive impact. 留下深刻的印象 ('leave a deep impression') is a high-frequency business Chinese phrase. The full pattern is diplomatic and face-saving.
examples: 虽然在北京只待了一个星期，但北京给我留下了深刻的印象。（Although I only stayed in Beijing for a week, Beijing left a deep impression on me.）

grammar.explanation: Standard Chinese location description for commercial properties and official addresses. Three beats: (1) 位于 + address, (2) 临近 + landmark/transit, (3) evaluative summary (交通便利, 地理位置优越, etc.).
examples: 东方商务写字楼，位于青年大街127号，东风桥往北50米，在城市商业中心区，临近地铁四号线，有多路公交车可以直达，地理位置好，交通便利。

grammar.explanation: 'Equipped with [list of facilities]'. 配有 is the formal/written counterpart of 有 when listing equipment or amenities, especially in commercial, real-estate, or product descriptions.
examples: 写字楼配有电话、宽带网络、中央空调。（The office building is equipped with telephone, broadband, and central air-conditioning.）

grammar.pattern: 因使用不当或其他人为原因...负责赔偿或修复
grammar.explanation: Legal liability clause: 'Due to improper use or other man-made causes...shall be responsible for compensation or repair.' 使用不当 = improper use; 人为原因 = man-made causes; 负责 + V = 'to be responsible for V-ing'.
examples: 因使用不当或其他人为原因使房屋或设施损坏的，乙方负责赔偿或修复。

grammar.explanation: 'Please take/transfer to [alternative transport]'. 改乘 = 'change to (another vehicle/service)'. Used for rebooking passengers onto alternative transport after a cancellation or delay.
examples: 请您改乘明日NH906次航班，起飞时间为11点。（Please rebook onto tomorrow's NH906 flight, departing at 11:00.）

expr.meaning: to attract investment / to solicit tenants or business partners; also used as a noun: leasing/investment invitation. 招商广告 = investment/leasing advertisement.
to negotiate / to discuss (business). More formal and specific than 谈 or 商量; used for business negotiations.
security deposit / cash deposit. Paid upfront and returned (退押金) on checkout, subject to deductions for damage.
public order / public security. 治安好 = good neighbourhood safety. 治安问题 = security issues.
property management fee (covers building maintenance, security, common-area upkeep). Often shortened to 物业费.
premium / fully renovated (highest level of finish in Chinese real estate listings). Contrasts with 简装修 (basic finish) and 毛坯房 (bare concrete shell).
lessee (the one renting) / lessor (the one renting out). Used in formal lease contracts alongside 甲方/乙方.
Party A / Party B. Universal in all Chinese contracts regardless of transaction type.
liability for breach of contract. 违约 = breach/default; 责任 = liability/responsibility.

expr.pinyin: yī shì ___ fèn, shuāngfāng gè zhí ___ fèn
expr.meaning: 'Executed in N copies, one held by each party.' Standard closing formula in all Chinese contracts.
'We hereby express our sincere/deepest apologies.' Fixed formal apology phrase for official announcements, letters, and public communications. Stronger than 对不起 or 抱歉.
'Await further notice / stand by for notification.' Used in official announcements when a situation is ongoing.
'Establish a long-term cooperative relationship.' A cornerstone phrase in business Chinese for signalling sustained partnership commitment.
'Leave a deep/profound impression.' Used to express that a place, person, or event made a strong positive impact.

'Have a safe journey / bon voyage.' The most formal farewell wish for travellers; appropriate for business guests. Variants in descending formality: 一路顺风 (may the wind be with you), 一路顺利 (smooth journey), 旅途愉快 (have a pleasant trip).

expr.pinyin: zhè dōu shì wǒ yīnggāi zuò de
expr.meaning: 'This is all just what I should do / it was the least I could do.' Standard humble deflection of praise or thanks in Chinese professional and social contexts.
'In the blink of an eye.' Vivid idiomatic expression for time passing very quickly. Usually followed by 就 + verb.
'Didn't have time to / didn't get around to / didn't manage to (in time).' Expresses that an opportunity passed without the action being completed.
'Almost (but didn't).' Signals a near-miss for something typically undesirable. Note: 差点儿没 + V means 'just barely managed to V' — the negation reverses the implication.
Luggage is overweight. 超重 = to exceed the weight limit. Used at airport check-in.
To check (luggage); to consign for transport. 托运两件行李 = check two bags. Contrasts with 带上飞机 (carry on board).
Check-in / boarding procedures. 办理登机手续 = to complete check-in formalities.
To transfer to / rebook onto (another vehicle or service). Used when a passenger needs to switch to an alternative transport option.
'Interested parties.' Standard noun phrase in Chinese classified ads and commercial announcements for referring to potential buyers/renters.
'Fully equipped with appliances and furniture.' A fixed collocational phrase in rental listings.

expr.zh: 能为您提供安全、舒适、便利的办公环境
expr.pinyin: néng wèi nín tígōng ānquán, shūshì, biànlì de bàngōng huánjìng
expr.meaning: 'Can provide you with a safe, comfortable, and convenient office environment.' A standard three-adjective promotional closing in Chinese commercial-property advertising.
Minimum lease term is three months. 起 here means 'starting from / minimum of'. Pattern: [duration] + 起租.

expr.pinyin: àn shíjì shǐyòng liàng zì fù
expr.meaning: 'Pay according to actual usage / pay by actual consumption.' Standard Chinese utility-split clause in lease agreements.
Mechanical fault / technical malfunction. Standard phrase for equipment failures in transport and industrial contexts.
'Due to weather conditions.' A fixed phrase for weather-related delays, cancellations, or disruptions in transport and event contexts.
To go on a business trip. 出差 is the standard term; 商务出行 is more formal in writing.

takeaways: Use the three-beat property description template: 位于[address] → 临近[transit/landmark] → 交通便利/地理位置好. This structure appears in both spoken sales pitches and written ads and can be applied to any location description.
For formal apologies in Chinese (business letters, announcements, emails), use 在此深表歉意 or 对此深表歉意 rather than 对不起/很抱歉. The 由于[原因]...在此深表歉意 pattern is the complete formal template.

Chinese classified ads and commercial notices pack maximum information into minimum words: address, layout (N室M厅), price, inclusions (包括...在内), payment terms (月付/季付), and contact (有意者请联系...). Study these slots to write or decode any Chinese ad.
In all Chinese contracts, regardless of domain, master: 甲方/乙方, 承租方/出租方, 按实际使用量自付, 违约责任由责任一方承担, 一式N份双方各执N份. These five recurring elements appear in virtually every Chinese private contract.

The airport-announcement genre follows a fixed five-part structure: (1) address passengers by destination (前往X的乘客请注意), (2) state the situation with 由于, (3) give the consequence/update, (4) express apology (深表歉意), (5) direct to contact or action. This template is reusable for any Chinese public notice announcing a problem.

The read-back confirmation pattern (我重复一遍：..., 没有问题的话就...) is essential in service-industry Chinese — at ticket windows, when placing orders, and in customer service calls. Using it signals professionalism and prevents errors.

差点儿 and 没来得及 cover two distinct near-miss meanings: 差点儿 = nearly happened (usually something undesirable); 没来得及 = didn't get to do something in time (regret about inaction). Using both correctly distinguishes advanced from intermediate speakers.

Business farewells in Chinese follow an escalating formality ladder: 旅途愉快 (pleasant journey, casual) → 一路顺利 (smooth journey) → 一路顺风 (may the wind be with you, idiomatic) → 一路平安 (safe journey, most formal, appropriate for departing business guests). Match the level to the relationship.

When expressing concession in professional Chinese, the pattern 虽然...只...，但...给我留下了深刻的印象 is diplomatically powerful: it acknowledges a limitation upfront (short visit, small project, limited budget) and pivots to the strong positive impact — a face-saving, relationship-building rhetorical move.

For commercial property (office buildings, shops), Chinese promotional copy always closes with social proof: 现在已有多家著名企业入住 ('a number of well-known companies have already moved in'). This pattern applies equally to hotel ads (多家知名企业选择), product endorsements, and event announcements.

essays.title: 《中华成语故事》前言
essays.text:
我国历史悠久，灿烂的文化博大精深。成语作为古人智慧的结晶、汉语言中的精华，以其言近旨远、形象生动的独有特点，传承了中华五千年丰富的历史文化。而成语典故更是集深厚的历史底蕴与强烈的文学色彩于一体，其内涵深刻，妙趣无穷，真实地保留下一段段传奇往事和历史遗痕。

《中华成语故事》（图文版）共收录了三百零四条成语典故，根据它们所包涵的不同意义，分为六个篇章，即：品格意志、为人处世、智慧谋略、好学求知、生活启示、幽默诙谐。每个篇章各收录了几十条具有典型教育意义的成语，并注明其词义、用法、出处与典故。每条成语，我们都竭力返本溯源，对于起源较晚的，也在故事中说明其演变过程，使读者了解来龙去脉，从而加深对每条成语的理解。

本书是一套图文并茂的成语鉴赏书籍，取材广泛、体例新颖、编排合理，并注重知识性、准确性、趣味性。在条目方面，我们着重选取了实用性强，同时对青少年读者具有启发教育意义的成语故事；在内容上，力求做到深入浅出，语言通俗易懂，适合青少年理解与记忆，通过文字、图片、版式的有机结合，将一个个脍炙人口的成语故事呈现给读者。本书还将与成语典故相关的风格多样的手绘插图、背景资料、文物古迹作为参考信息补充融入其中，使版面内容更加层次丰富。让读者通过成语典故去了解中华民族悠久的历史、宝贵的文化遗产、高超的智慧、历久弥新的语言文字；通过鲜活的图片及插图使学习成语、掌握成语成为一个轻松、愉快的过程；使青少年原有的知识结构在这种全新的形式下获得更新与提高。
essays.summary: Official editorial preface describing the book's scope (304 chengyu stories across six thematic chapters), methodology (tracing each idiom to its origins), and educational aims for young readers.
essays.why_study: Exemplifies formal Chinese editorial/scholarly preface style: 四字短语串联 as structural backbone, layered scope (single expression → cultural heritage → history), and elegant purposive sentence closers (让读者通过…去了解…). High model value for academic forewords, grant proposals, or any formal introductory writing in Chinese.
key_devices: 四字格串联排比 (取材广泛、体例新颖、编排合理)
集A与B于一体 (combining two qualities into one subject)
力求做到… (aspirational goal marker in formal writing)
通过A的有机结合，将B呈现给C (purposive chain: instrument → product → audience)
让读者通过…去了解/使…成为… (paired 让/使 sentences for effect statement)

essays.title: 卧薪尝胆
essays.text:
春秋时期，吴国和越国作战，越国兵败投降，越王勾践被迫前往吴国服役。在吴国，勾践身穿粗布衣裳，每日为吴王夫差养马驾车。其妻也如仆人一般，身着布衣，每日清早便起身打扫灰尘。日复一日，年复一年，越王勾践在吴国受尽了折磨和羞辱。终于在三年后，吴王夫差觉得勾践的确甘心臣服，已不可能起兵反抗，就把他及其妻子、随从释放回国。

勾践深觉自己应没齿不忘战败之痛、服役之辱，暗暗发誓一定要雪耻报仇。他回国后，仍穿粗布衣衫，吃粗茶淡饭，以柴草为褥。他冬天抱着冰块睡觉，夏天烤着炭火入眠。在自己卧榻之侧，勾践挂上苦胆，每天都去尝一口胆汁，借此时刻激励自己的复仇意志。越王勾践处处身体力行，励精图治，使越国的经济和军事实力都得到了长足的发展，终于在公元前473年一举消灭了吴国，一雪前耻。
essays.summary: King Gou Jian of Yue endures years of servitude in Wu, then returns to live with deliberate austerity — sleeping on brushwood, tasting bile daily — as self-imposed discipline, until he destroys Wu twenty years later.
essays.why_study: One of the canonical four-character narrative arcs in classical Chinese: defeat → humiliation → self-discipline → reversal (雪耻). The pacing devices (日复一日，年复一年) and seasonal contrast (冬天…夏天…) are reusable templates. Vocabulary spans concrete hardship, interior resolve, and geopolitical outcome in a single compact passage.
key_devices: 日复一日，年复一年 (iterative time intensifier for sustained effort)
冬天…夏天… (seasonal antithesis to show extremity of self-punishment)
深觉/暗暗发誓 (interior monologue markers without 'he thought')
身体力行，励精图治，…终于 (effort → sustained effort → earned resolution arc)
一雪前耻 (four-character climactic idiom as closing punch)

essays.title: 破釜沉舟
essays.text:
秦朝末年，秦派兵攻打复国后的赵国。赵军不敌，退守巨鹿（今河北平乡西南），被秦军包围。被项梁、项羽叔侄等各路义军拥立的楚怀王任命宋义为上将军，项羽为副将，让他们带领军队前去援救赵国。但是，宋义把兵带到安阳就不再前进了，在此停留了四十六天。项羽非常焦急，再三要求他渡江北上，与赵军里应外合，一举打败秦军。而宋义则希望赵、秦两军打得精疲力尽之时再发兵，以坐收渔翁之利。于是他严令军中不准轻举妄动。与此同时，宋义又宴请宾客，大吃大喝，而士兵、百姓却忍饥挨饿。项羽实在忍不下去，便杀死了宋义，将士们马上拥戴项羽为上将军。

之后，项羽立即派出两名将军，率两万人马渡河解救巨鹿。取得小胜后，项羽下令全军渡河救援赵军。在全军渡河之后，他采取了一系列果断的行动：把所有船只凿沉，把煮饭的锅都打破，把营房都烧掉，只携带三天的干粮，以此表示决一死战的决心，不给士兵留一点儿退路。项羽领军到达巨鹿外围，立即包围了秦军，经过九天激战，最终取得巨鹿之战的胜利。
essays.summary: Xiang Yu, frustrated by the general Song Yi's paralysis and self-indulgence, kills him, takes command, crosses the river, then smashes all boats and cooking pots so his troops must fight to the death — and wins the decisive Battle of Julu.
essays.why_study: Classic military narrative with sharp character contrast (inaction vs. decisiveness). The three-item anaphoric list 把…凿沉，把…打破，把…烧掉 is a reusable template for listing irreversible actions. The structure of 'accumulated frustration → decisive break → total commitment → victory' is applicable to persuasive essays and case studies.
key_devices: 人物对比刻画 (宋义 self-indulgence vs. 项羽 decisive action — set up before the pivot)
把字句排比三连 (把…凿沉，把…打破，把…烧掉 — anaphoric listing of drastic actions)
以此表示…，不给… (dual-purpose clause: signal intent + eliminate alternative)
取得小胜后，…下令全军… (staged escalation of commitment)
经过九天激战，最终取得… (duration marker + climactic resolution)

essays.title: 负荆请罪
essays.text:
蔺相如和廉颇是战国时期赵国著名的文臣武将。蔺相如因在出使秦国时立下了大功而被赵王拜为上卿，名列廉颇之上。这使为赵国屡建战功的大将廉颇很不服气，到处扬言要当众羞辱蔺相如。蔺相如知道后，处处回避廉颇，致使他手下的随从以为他胆小而感到非常羞辱。

蔺相如闻言道：“像秦王那样威风，我尚敢当面呵斥，现在我怎么会怕廉颇呢？我之所以避着他，完全是为国家安危着想，不想让敌国有任何可乘之机呀！”

不久廉颇听到了蔺相如所说的话，十分惭愧。于是他脱下衣袍，袒露脊梁，背负荆条，来到蔺相如家中，跪在地上向蔺相如请罪。他说：“廉颇无知，不知先生如此宽宏大量，得罪之处，还请先生恕罪！”蔺相如急忙躬身扶起大将廉颇。从此，二人仇怨尽消，团结一心，共同报效国家。
essays.summary: General Lian Po resents minister Lin Xiangru's higher rank and threatens humiliation; Lin avoids him for the state's sake; hearing Lin's reasoning, Lian Po strips to the waist, carries thorns on his back, and begs forgiveness — they become allies.
essays.why_study: Model for virtuous interpersonal reasoning and dramatic reconciliation. Contains two reusable patterns: the 之所以…完全是为了 pivot to explain counter-intuitive behavior, and the sequence of physical humiliation actions (脱下…袒露…背负…来到…跪在…) that show rather than tell remorse. The final 从此，二人… is a clean resolution formula.
key_devices: 之所以A，完全是为了B (explanatory causal pivot — justifying what looks like weakness)
像A那样…，我尚敢…，现在怎么会…（递进反问 escalating rhetorical question）
行为序列描述 (脱下…袒露…背负…来到…跪在… — physical enactment of remorse)
致使 (causing an unintended negative consequence — useful formal connector)
从此，二人仇怨尽消，团结一心 (resolution formula with two balanced final clauses)

essays.title: 痛定思痛——文天祥传略与《过零丁洋》
essays.text:
公元1275年，元朝军队兵临南宋都城临安城下，南宋形势十分危急。右丞相文天祥毅然辞去官职，主动请求以资政殿学士的身份前往元军的军营探察情况。文天祥到了元军营中之后，慷慨激昂地怒斥了元军入侵的罪行。元军统帅伯颜十分钦佩文天祥，想劝他投降，被文天祥拒绝了。于是他又强迫文天祥前往元朝的京城大都。在船行驶到京口时，文天祥乘敌人没有防备，坐上一条小船逃走了。文天祥想向南宋军禀告元军的情况，但驻守扬州的淮东边帅李庭芝以为文天祥已投降元军，下令将他逮捕。文天祥不得已只得绕过扬子江口，几经辗转来到永嘉，最后又乘船去福州。经历了这些事情之后，文天祥在《指南录后序》中感叹道：“生与死，像昼夜转换一样平淡无奇。如果死了也就算了，但艰险的困境反复出现，不是世人所能承受得了的。痛苦的心情平定之后，再去回想当时痛苦的情景，更加令人伤感。”

南宋名将文天祥积极抗元，终因寡不敌众而被捕。后文天祥被元军软禁在军船上，押往燕京。路过零丁洋，面对波涛汹涌的大海，感慨惆怅之余，挥笔写下千古名作《过零丁洋》：

辛苦遭逢起一经，干戈寥落四周星。
山河破碎风飘絮，身世浮沉雨打萍。
惶恐滩头说惶恐，零丁洋里叹零丁。
人生自古谁无死，留取丹心照汗青。
essays.summary: Wen Tianxiang defies the Yuan invaders, flees capture, wanders in exile, and on the way to execution composes the immortal poem 《过零丁洋》, ending with the line that became the emblem of patriotic sacrifice: '人生自古谁无死，留取丹心照汗青.'
essays.why_study: Dual model: (1) formal prose narrating adversity with 几经辗转 and 寡不敌众, and (2) the canonical 律诗 using landscape-as-fate metaphor, place-name double meaning (惶恐/零丁), and a universalizing moral close. The final couplet is among the most quoted lines in Chinese — understanding its structure is essential for patriotic or commemorative register.
key_devices: 律诗结构 (首联/颔联/颈联/尾联 — four couplets, each with distinct rhetorical function)
景物喻身世 (风飘絮=破碎河山; 雨打萍=drifting personal fate — landscape mapped onto biography)
地名双关 (惶恐滩→inward terror; 零丁洋→inner desolation — place names echo emotional state)
人生自古谁无死… (rhetorical universal question opening the moral conclusion)
几经辗转 (formal literary adverb for repeated reversal and wandering — concise and vivid)

essays.title: 鞠躬尽瘁——诸葛亮北伐
essays.text:
公元220年，曹操的儿子曹丕废去汉献帝，自己做了皇帝，改国号为魏，即魏文帝。不久，占据四川一带的刘备也宣告登基，即历史上所谓的蜀汉“先主”。刘备任命诸葛亮为丞相，定都成都。这样，连同江南的东吴，就出现了魏、蜀、吴三国鼎立的局面。不久，刘备去世，他的儿子刘禅继位，历史上称为“后主”。诸葛亮仍任丞相，并受封为“武乡侯”，掌握了蜀汉的一切军政大权。

诸葛亮是一贯主张联吴抗魏的。他一面和东吴结好，一面南征孟获，平定南中诸郡，以消除后顾之忧，然后操练兵马，积极准备北伐魏国。出征前，他曾上表后主，力劝刘禅听信忠言，任用贤臣，疏远小人，这就是流传千古的《前出师表》。但是，这次北伐没有成功，诸葛亮暂时退兵回蜀。后来，他再次发动北伐，蜀国有不少官员极力反对。诸葛亮因此又上一表，说明蜀汉与曹魏势不两立，必须北伐的道理，即《后出师表》。在这篇宏文伟论中，诸葛亮表示自己要为蜀汉事业“鞠躬尽力，死而后已”，字里行间，无不体现出一位忠臣贤相的高风亮节。
essays.summary: After Liu Bei's death Zhuge Liang balances the three-kingdom equilibrium, campaigns south to secure the rear, and twice memorializes the weak heir-emperor in famous documents before northern expeditions. His words 鞠躬尽力，死而后已 became the definitive statement of selfless loyal service.
essays.why_study: Model for political-historical narrative with clear factional mapping, strategic sequencing, and character evaluation. The phrase 以消除后顾之忧，然后… shows subordinate-clause strategic reasoning; 字里行间，无不体现出… is a high-register critical appreciation formula usable in writing analysis or character eulogies.
key_devices: 一面A，一面B (parallel simultaneous action — multi-front strategy)
以消除后顾之忧，然后… (precondition phrase followed by main action — strategic sequencing)
流传千古的《…》 (prestige-framing of a canonical text)
字里行间，无不体现出… (critical appreciation formula for implicit textual qualities)
高风亮节 (moral character idiom as closing evaluation)

essays.title: 洁身自好——屈原与渔夫
essays.text:
战国时期，楚国三闾大夫屈原，因不与同朝贪官同流合污，被人陷害遭到流放。他常常一边走，一边吟唱着楚国的诗歌，心中牵挂着国家大事。一天，屈原来到湘江边。一个渔夫见到他后惊讶地问：“你不就是屈大夫吗？为何落到这般地步？”

屈原叹息道：“整个世道都像这泛滥的江水一样浑浊，而我却像山泉一样清澈见底。”

渔夫故意说：“世道浑浊，你为什么不搅动泥沙，推波助澜？何苦洁身自好，遭此下场。”

屈原说：“我听说一个人洗头后戴帽，先要弹去帽上的灰尘；洗澡后穿衣，先要抖直衣服。我怎么能使自己洁净的身躯被脏物污染呢。”

渔夫听这番话后，对屈原正直和高尚的品格十分敬佩，于是唱着歌，划着船离开了。
essays.summary: Exiled Qu Yuan meets a fisherman on the Xiang River; when the fisherman provocatively suggests going along with the corrupt world, Qu Yuan uses a vivid domestic analogy — one doesn't put on clean clothes without shaking the dust off first — to explain why he cannot compromise integrity.
essays.why_study: Models the Socratic dialogue structure in classical Chinese: provocative challenge → extended metaphor reply → silent approval-and-departure as validation. The 世道浑浊/山泉清澈 water metaphor and the 洗头/洗澡 analogy demonstrate how to build an ethical argument from concrete, everyday imagery. Dialogue-driven and accessible; useful for understanding how to argue values without abstraction.
key_devices: 以水喻世道 (turbid river = corrupt world; mountain spring = personal integrity)
故意说 (narrator marks the fisherman's challenge as a rhetorical probe, not genuine advice)
日常类比构筑道德论证 (洗头→弹灰, 洗澡→抖衣 — concrete hygiene analogy for moral cleanliness)
何苦…，遭此下场 (rhetorical challenge with negative consequence — invites rebuttal)
